▸Persona: 🎬 restaurant_manager🔗 #story-restaurant_manager 🍽️ RESTAURANT 🗣️ fr-FR
Runs a SINGLE location (HubRise location): handles the live order queue. Assigned by the owner; can only manage the location they are assigned to.

▸Persona: 🎬 restaurant_sync🔗 #story-restaurant_sync 🔌 EXTERNAL 🗣️ fr-FR
The Sirene/Google sync ACL (a scheduled worker) acting as an EXTERNAL caller. It seeds and refreshes public listings on the restaurants' behalf — no human; it issues the same commands an owner would.
ActivityStepOperation
SyncListingsSeedListing✏️ registerRestaurant
EnrichGoogleProfile✏️ updateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile
MarkClosed✏️ markRestaurantClosed
ProspectionContactProspect✏️ recordProspectContact
MarkCold✏️ markProspectCold
▸Persona: 🎬 delivery_partner🔗 #story-delivery_partner 🔌 EXTERNAL 🗣️ fr-FR
A delivery partner (already integrated: a known catalog channel) acting as an EXTERNAL caller through the partner portal / API (#61). It self-registers its availability to serve a city, tracks the review status, and withdraws when it pauses service — no engineer in the loop for the common case.
ActivityStepOperation
RegisterCityAvailabilitySubmitAvailability✏️ registerDeliveryPartnerAvailability
TrackStatus🔎 deliveryPartnerAvailabilities
WithdrawAvailability✏️ revokeDeliveryPartnerAvailability
🔲 1. restaurant 🔗
Restaurant provider domain: accounts, locations, lifecycle, order-acceptance mode (incl. catalog & order-fulfilment operations performed by restaurant staff).
🧰 API operations (25)
▸Query: 🔎 restaurants🔗 #query-restaurants
Discover: public list of restaurants. All args are optional filters resolved by the read side (Restaurant); the query returns only matching restaurants. `list` selects a curated/ personalized shelf (the read model resolves its members).
input: 🧩 RestaurantsQueryInput { search?: string, tags?: [🔤 Tag], serviceType?: 🔤 ServiceType, openNow?: boolean, city?: 🔤 CityName, priceRange?: 🔤 PriceRange, list?: 🔤 RestaurantListKey, listingStatus?: 🔤 RestaurantListingStatus, orderableOnly?: boolean }
returns: 🧩 Restaurant [] · reads 🗄️ Restaurant
roles: EVERYONE (open — roles omitted) · V0
▸Query: 🔎 restaurant🔗 #query-restaurant
A restaurant + its catalog by slug (multi-tenant resolution by Host or /r/{slug}).
input: 🧩 RestaurantQueryInput! { slug: 🔤 Slug }
returns: 🧩 Restaurant · reads 🗄️ Restaurant
roles: EVERYONE (open — roles omitted) · V0
▸Query: 🔎 restaurantDeliveries🔗 #query-restaurantdeliveries
A restaurant's active delivery jobs (delivery board; ownership enforced server-side).
input: 🧩 RestaurantDeliveriesQueryInput! { restaurantId: 🔤 RestaurantId, status?: 🔤 DeliveryStatus }
returns: 🧩 DeliveryJob [] · reads 🗄️ View_DeliveryJob
roles: RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT · V0
▸Query: 🔎 pendingRefunds🔗 #query-pendingrefunds
The refund queue (RefundProcess): refunds opened for decision, with their lifecycle status (status = REQUESTED is the pending, awaiting-decision queue). The restaurant sees its own orders' refunds (restaurant-scoped, ownership enforced server-side); an admin arbitrates across restaurants.
input: 🧩 PendingRefundsQueryInput { restaurantId?: 🔤 RestaurantId, status?: 🔤 RefundStatus }
returns: 🧩 Refund [] · reads 🗄️ View_PendingRefunds
roles: RESTAURANT, ADMIN · V0
▸Query: 🔎 restaurantLocationsByAccount🔗 #query-restaurantlocationsbyaccount
All restaurant locations under an account (back-office; ownership enforced server-side).
input: 🧩 RestaurantLocationsByAccountQueryInput! { accountId: 🔤 RestaurantAccountId }
returns: 🧩 Restaurant [] · reads 🗄️ Restaurant
roles: ADMIN, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT · V1
▸Query: 🔎 prospectionPipeline🔗 #query-prospectionpipeline
B2B prospection pipeline (admin): scored prospects, optionally filtered by minimum score / pipeline status.
input: 🧩 ProspectionPipelineQueryInput { minScore?: 🔤 ProspectionScore, status?: 🔤 ProspectPipelineStatus }
returns: 🧩 Prospect [] · reads 🗄️ ProspectionPipeline
roles: ADMIN · V1

▸Type: 🧩 Restaurant🔗 #type-restaurant

🎭 Actors (3)
▸Actor: 🎭 RestaurantAccount🔗 #actor-restaurantaccount
A restaurant account (HubRise: restaurant) that owns one or more Restaurant locations.
🧩 aggregate
ReceivesEmits →Throws
📩 RegisterRestaurantAccount⚡ RestaurantAccountRegistered⛔ RefAlreadyUsed, ⛔ InvalidCurrency
📩 UpdateRestaurantAccount⚡ RestaurantAccountUpdated⛔ RestaurantAccountNotFound, ⛔ NoEditableFieldProvided
📩 DeleteRestaurantAccount⚡ RestaurantAccountDeleted⛔ RestaurantAccountNotFound
▸Actor: 🎭 Restaurant🔗 #actor-restaurant
A single restaurant location: profile, operational status (DRAFT/ACTIVE/INACTIVE), live acceptance mode, and the partnership LISTING funnel (NON_PARTNER → PASSIVE_PARTNER → ACTIVE_PARTNER). The Sirene/Google sync is an EXTERNAL ACL that calls RegisterRestaurant / UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile / MarkRestaurantClosed here AS THE OWNER — there is no dedicated pre-registration command; an account-less registration with listingStatus NON_PARTNER is a seeded listing.
🧩 aggregate
ReceivesEmits →Throws
📩 RegisterRestaurant⚡ RestaurantRegistered⛔ RestaurantAccountNotFound, ⛔ SlugAlreadyTaken, ⛔ RefAlreadyUsed
📩 ActivateRestaurant⚡ RestaurantActivated⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ RestaurantNotReadyForActivation
📩 UpdateRestaurant⚡ RestaurantUpdated⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ NoEditableFieldProvided
📩 DeactivateRestaurant⚡ RestaurantDeactivated⛔ RestaurantNotFound
📩 ChangeOrderAcceptanceMode⚡ RestaurantAcceptanceModeChanged⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ RestaurantNotActive, ⛔ AcceptanceModeUnchanged
📩 RemoveRestaurant⚡ RestaurantRemoved⛔ RestaurantNotFound
📩 UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated⛔ RestaurantNotFound
📩 MarkRestaurantClosed⚡ RestaurantMarkedClosed⛔ RestaurantNotFound
📩 ClaimRestaurantListing⚡ RestaurantListingClaimed⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ ListingOwnershipNotVerified, ⛔ ListingAlreadyClaimed
📩 OptOutRestaurantListing⚡ RestaurantListingOptedOut⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ ListingOwnershipNotVerified
📩 ChangeRestaurantListingStatus⚡ RestaurantListingStatusChanged⛔ RestaurantNotFound
📩 ConfigureGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkConfigured⛔ RestaurantNotFound
📩 VerifyGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkVerified⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ GbpOrderLinkNotConfigured
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> DRAFT : RestaurantRegistered
  DRAFT --> ACTIVE : RestaurantActivated
  INACTIVE --> ACTIVE : RestaurantActivated
  DRAFT --> INACTIVE : RestaurantDeactivated
  ACTIVE --> INACTIVE : RestaurantDeactivated
  DRAFT --> INACTIVE : RestaurantRemoved
  ACTIVE --> INACTIVE : RestaurantRemoved
  INACTIVE --> INACTIVE : RestaurantRemoved
  DRAFT --> INACTIVE : RestaurantMarkedClosed
  ACTIVE --> INACTIVE : RestaurantMarkedClosed
  INACTIVE --> INACTIVE : RestaurantMarkedClosed
▸Actor: 🎭 Prospect🔗 #actor-prospect
Sales/CRM state of a NON_PARTNER restaurant listing worked as a B2B prospect (ADR-0020); id = restaurantId. The `prospection-acl` worker (EXTERNAL) reads the COMPUTED score from ProspectionPipeline + the schedule, fires HubSpot/Resend/Slack, then records the contact fact here. The score is never an input or an emitted event. First RecordProspectContact is the prospect's birth; anti-spam invariants guard contacts.
🧩 aggregate
ReceivesEmits →Throws
📩 RecordProspectContact⚡ ProspectContacted⛔ ProspectContactLimitReached, ⛔ ProspectContactedTooRecently
📩 MarkProspectCold⚡ ProspectMarkedCold⛔ ProspectNotFound
📩 RecordProspectReply⚡ ProspectReplied⛔ ProspectNotFound
🗄️ Views (3)
▸View: 🗄️ View_RestaurantAccount🔗 #view-view_restaurantaccount
source: 🎭 RestaurantAccount · 🛶 V0 · 🔒 internal
Account read model (HubRise restaurant). Holds account-level facts shared by its locations; locations denormalize default_currency from here.
fed by: ⚡ RestaurantAccountRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantAccountUpdated, ⚡ RestaurantAccountDeleted
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
restaurant_account_id🔤 RestaurantAccountId (derived)⚡ RestaurantAccountRegistered.restaurantAccountIdPK

updated_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
▸View: 🗄️ Restaurant🔗 #view-restaurant
source: 🎭 Restaurant · 🛶 V0
fed by: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantUpdated, ⚡ RestaurantActivated, ⚡ RestaurantDeactivated, ⚡ RestaurantAcceptanceModeChanged, ⚡ RestaurantRemoved, ⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated, ⚡ RestaurantListingClaimed, ⚡ RestaurantListingOptedOut, ⚡ RestaurantMarkedClosed, ⚡ RestaurantListingStatusChanged, ⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkConfigured, ⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkVerified, ⚡ RestaurantAccountRegistered
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
restaurant_id🔤 RestaurantId (derived)⚡ RestaurantRegistered.restaurantIdPK
restaurant_account_id🔤 RestaurantAccountId (derived) → 🗄️ View_RestaurantAccount⚡ RestaurantRegistered.accountId, ⚡ RestaurantListingClaimed.accountIdindex, nullableNULL for a non-partner public listing; set on claim/conversion.
listing_status🔤 RestaurantListingStatus⚡ RestaurantRegistered.listingStatus, ⚡ RestaurantListingStatusChanged.listingStatusindex
external_identifiersjsonb⚡ RestaurantRegistered.externalIdentifiersnullableSource-agnostic [{key,value}] (siret/naf/google_place_id…); not unique.
google_place_id🔤 GooglePlaceId⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated.googlePlaceIdnullable
slug🔤 Slug (derived)⚡ RestaurantRegistered.slugunique
display_name🔤 RestaurantDisplayName (derived)⚡ RestaurantRegistered.displayName, ⚡ RestaurantUpdated.displayName—
descriptiontext⚠️ nonenullable⚠️ HOLE: no event carries a restaurant description — nothing populates this column yet.
tagsjsonb⚡ RestaurantRegistered.tags, ⚡ RestaurantUpdated.tagsnullableCuisine/attribute tags — general restaurant info (source-agnostic), not from the GBP event.
margin_rate🔤 MarginPercent⚡ RestaurantRegistered.marginRate, ⚡ RestaurantUpdated.marginRatenullableFood margin %, input to the Captain service-fee split (ADR-0017); back-office only.
cuisine_category🔤 CuisineCategory⚡ RestaurantRegistered.cuisineCategory, ⚡ RestaurantUpdated.cuisineCategorynullableSelects the Uber Eats price-estimate coefficient in UberEstimationPolicy (ADR-0024).
uber_prices_opt_inboolean⚡ RestaurantRegistered.uberPricesOptIn, ⚡ RestaurantUpdated.uberPricesOptInnullableRestaurant authorized showing its real Uber prices via HubRise (ADR-0023). Gates REAL vs ESTIMATED basis.
website🔤 WebUrl⚡ RestaurantRegistered.website, ⚡ RestaurantUpdated.websitenullable
rating🔤 GoogleRating⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated.ratingnullableGBP-specific metric (Google listing), independent of the restaurant's own info.
reviews_countinteger⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated.reviewsCountnullable
gbp_order_url🔤 WebUrl⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkConfigured.gbpOrderUrlnullable
gbp_link_status🔤 GbpLinkStatus⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkVerified.statusnullable
addressjsonb (derived)⚡ RestaurantRegistered.address, ⚡ RestaurantUpdated.address—
locationjsonb (derived)⚡ RestaurantRegistered.location, ⚡ RestaurantUpdated.locationnullableGeo coordinates {latitude, longitude}; typically from the Google Maps sync.
opening_hoursjsonb (derived)⚡ RestaurantRegistered.openingHours, ⚡ RestaurantUpdated.openingHours—
status🔤 RestaurantStatus⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantActivated, ⚡ RestaurantDeactivated, ⚡ RestaurantRemoved, ⚡ RestaurantMarkedClosed—Derived from the lifecycle event type: DRAFT on register, ACTIVE/INACTIVE on (de)activation, INACTIVE on closure.
order_acceptance🔤 OrderAcceptanceMode (derived)⚡ RestaurantAcceptanceModeChanged.mode—
default_currency🔤 CurrencyCode (derived)⚡ RestaurantAccountRegistered.defaultCurrency—
timezone🔤 TimeZone (derived)⚡ RestaurantRegistered.timezone, ⚡ RestaurantUpdated.timezonenullableLocation timezone; falls back to the account's when null.
preparation_time_minutesinteger (derived)⚡ RestaurantRegistered.preparationTimeMinutes, ⚡ RestaurantUpdated.preparationTimeMinutesnullable
created_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
updated_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
▸View: 🗄️ ProspectionPipeline🔗 #view-prospectionpipeline
source: 🎭 Prospect · 🔭 V1
B2B prospection pipeline (ADR-0020): one row per worked listing, with the COMPUTED score and outreach state. Read by the admin prospectionPipeline query.
fed by: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated, ⚡ RestaurantListingStatusChanged, ⚡ ProspectContacted, ⚡ ProspectMarkedCold, ⚡ ProspectReplied
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
restaurant_id🔤 RestaurantId (derived) → 🗄️ Restaurant⚡ RestaurantRegistered.restaurantIdPK
score🔤 ProspectionScore⚡ RestaurantRegistered.externalIdentifiers, ⚡ RestaurantRegistered.website, ⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated.rating, ⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated.reviewsCountindexDerived (see rules); not an event field.
pipeline_status🔤 ProspectPipelineStatus⚡ ProspectContacted, ⚡ ProspectMarkedCold, ⚡ ProspectReplied, ⚡ RestaurantListingStatusChangedindexDerived from the prospect events + listingStatus (see rules).
contacts_countinteger⚡ ProspectContacted—Count of ProspectContacted; drives the anti-spam ≤3 rule.
last_contacted_attimestamptz⚡ ProspectContactednullable
replied_attimestamptz⚡ ProspectRepliednullable
created_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
updated_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
📩 Commands (19)
▸Command: 📩 RegisterRestaurantAccount🔗 #command-registerrestaurantaccount
Admin creates a restaurant ACCOUNT (HubRise: restaurant) that will own one or more locations. Account-level facts (legal entity, billing contact, currency, default tax, timezone) live here.
dispatched by: ✏️ registerRestaurantAccount · handled by 🎭 RestaurantAccount
emits: ⚡ RestaurantAccountRegistered
throws: ⛔ RefAlreadyUsed, ⛔ InvalidCurrency
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantAccountId🔤 RestaurantAccountId✅ requiredClient-generated id for the new account.
legalName🔤 RestaurantLegalName✅ required
contact📦 RestaurantContact⬜ nullable
defaultCurrency🔤 CurrencyCode✅ required
defaultTaxRate📦 TaxRate✅ required
timezone🔤 TimeZone⬜ nullable
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullableHubRise restaurant (account) reference, when seeded externally.
▸Command: 📩 UpdateRestaurantAccount🔗 #command-updaterestaurantaccount
Owner/admin edits account-level fields (legal name, billing contact, default tax, timezone).
dispatched by: ✏️ updateRestaurantAccount · handled by 🎭 RestaurantAccount
emits: ⚡ RestaurantAccountUpdated
throws: ⛔ RestaurantAccountNotFound, ⛔ NoEditableFieldProvided
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantAccountId🔤 RestaurantAccountId✅ required
legalName🔤 RestaurantLegalName⬜ nullable
contact📦 RestaurantContact⬜ nullable
defaultTaxRate📦 TaxRate⬜ nullable
timezone🔤 TimeZone⬜ nullable
▸Command: 📩 DeleteRestaurantAccount🔗 #command-deleterestaurantaccount
Owner/admin closes a restaurant account (its locations must already be removed).
dispatched by: ✏️ deleteRestaurantAccount · handled by 🎭 RestaurantAccount
emits: ⚡ RestaurantAccountDeleted
throws: ⛔ RestaurantAccountNotFound
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantAccountId🔤 RestaurantAccountId✅ required
reasonstring⬜ nullable
▸Command: 📩 RegisterRestaurant🔗 #command-registerrestaurant
The single, generic way to register a restaurant LOCATION. Used by an owner/admin onboarding a partner location (accountId set), AND by the Sirene/Google sync ACL seeding a public listing as if it were the owner (no accountId, listingStatus NON_PARTNER, externalIdentifiers from the source). Starts in DRAFT.
dispatched by: ✏️ registerRestaurant · handled by 🎭 Restaurant
emits: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
throws: ⛔ RestaurantAccountNotFound, ⛔ SlugAlreadyTaken, ⛔ RefAlreadyUsed
FieldTypeReq.Description
mode🔤 Mode⬜ optional
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ requiredClient/ACL-generated id for the new location.
accountId🔤 RestaurantAccountId⬜ nullableThe owning account (must already exist) — omitted for a non-partner public listing.
listingStatus🔤 RestaurantListingStatus⬜ nullablePartnership funnel; defaults to NON_PARTNER when omitted (e.g. sync-seeded listing).
slug🔤 Slug✅ required
displayName🔤 RestaurantDisplayName✅ required
contact📦 RestaurantContact⬜ nullableLocation-specific contact; falls back to the account contact when absent.
website🔤 WebUrl⬜ nullable
tags[🔤 Tag]⬜ optional
marginRate🔤 MarginPercent⬜ nullableFood margin %, input to the service-fee split (ADR-0017).
cuisineCategory🔤 CuisineCategory⬜ nullableCuisine bucket; selects the Uber Eats price-estimate coefficient (ADR-0024).
uberPricesOptInboolean⬜ nullableAuthorize showing real Uber Eats prices for comparison (ADR-0023 opt-in).
address📦 Address✅ required
location📦 GeoPoint⬜ nullableGeo coordinates (typically from the Google Maps sync).
timezone🔤 TimeZone⬜ nullableLocation timezone; falls back to the account timezone when absent.
preparationTimeMinutesinteger⬜ nullable
openingHours[📦 OpeningHoursSlot]⬜ optional
externalIdentifiers[📦 ExternalIdentifier]⬜ optionalSource-agnostic identifiers preserving original keys (siret/naf/google_place_id…). Not unique.
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullableSet only when seeded from an external source (e.g. HubRise location).

Admin makes a restaurant visible and orderable by customers.

reasonstring⬜ nullable

address📦 Address⬜ nullable

▸Command: 📩 UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile🔗 #command-updaterestaurantgooglebusinessprofile
Record GBP-SPECIFIC metrics (Google place id + rating/reviews) for a restaurant. Issued by the Sirene/Google sync ACL (or admin). Carries ONLY Google-listing data — general restaurant info (name/address/hours/phone/website/tags) is set via Register/UpdateRestaurant, so the two data sources stay independent.
dispatched by: ✏️ updateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile · handled by 🎭 Restaurant
emits: ⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated
throws: ⛔ RestaurantNotFound
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
googlePlaceId🔤 GooglePlaceId⬜ nullable
rating🔤 GoogleRating⬜ nullable
reviewsCountinteger⬜ nullable

emits: ⚡ RestaurantMarkedClosed

reasonstring⬜ nullable
▸Command: 📩 ClaimRestaurantListing🔗 #command-claimrestaurantlisting
An owner claims a public listing. Ownership is proven by verifying the restaurant's Google Business Profile (delegated to Google as a start); the backend validates the proof server-side before accepting.
dispatched by: ✏️ claimRestaurantListing · handled by 🎭 Restaurant
emits: ⚡ RestaurantListingClaimed
throws: ⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ ListingOwnershipNotVerified, ⛔ ListingAlreadyClaimed
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
accountId🔤 RestaurantAccountId⬜ nullableAccount to attach the claimed listing to, when the claimant already has one.
googleOwnershipProofstring✅ requiredOpaque Google Business Profile ownership proof/token, verified server-side.
▸Command: 📩 OptOutRestaurantListing🔗 #command-optoutrestaurantlisting
An owner opts a public listing out (edit/remove), proven via Google Business Profile ownership.
dispatched by: ✏️ optOutRestaurantListing · handled by 🎭 Restaurant
emits: ⚡ RestaurantListingOptedOut
throws: ⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ ListingOwnershipNotVerified
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
googleOwnershipProofstring✅ requiredOpaque Google Business Profile ownership proof/token, verified server-side.
reasonstring⬜ nullable
▸Command: 📩 ChangeRestaurantListingStatus🔗 #command-changerestaurantlistingstatus
Admin moves a listing along the partnership funnel (NON_PARTNER → PASSIVE_PARTNER → ACTIVE_PARTNER).
dispatched by: ✏️ changeRestaurantListingStatus · handled by 🎭 Restaurant
emits: ⚡ RestaurantListingStatusChanged
throws: ⛔ RestaurantNotFound

listingStatus🔤 RestaurantListingStatus✅ required

restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
▸Command: 📩 RecordProspectContact🔗 #command-recordprospectcontact
Record a B2B outreach contact to a prospect. The worker decides WHO/WHEN from the read-model score + schedule; this just records the fact. First contact is the prospect's birth. Anti-spam invariants apply.
dispatched by: ✏️ recordProspectContact · handled by 🎭 Prospect
emits: ⚡ ProspectContacted
throws: ⛔ ProspectContactLimitReached, ⛔ ProspectContactedTooRecently
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
channel🔤 OutreachChannel✅ required
sequenceStepinteger✅ required
▸Command: 📩 MarkProspectCold🔗 #command-markprospectcold
Mark a prospect cold (no reply by J+21); stops the outreach sequence.
dispatched by: ✏️ markProspectCold · handled by 🎭 Prospect
emits: ⚡ ProspectMarkedCold
throws: ⛔ ProspectNotFound
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
reasonstring⬜ nullable

▸Event: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered🔗 #event-restaurantregistered
A restaurant location has been registered. Covers every path: an owner/admin onboarding a partner location (with accountId), or the Sirene/Google sync ACL seeding a public NON_PARTNER listing (no accountId). The listingStatus and externalIdentifiers distinguish them.

consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ Restaurant, 🗄️ ProspectionPipeline

▸Event: ⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated🔗 #event-restaurantgooglebusinessprofileupdated
GBP-SPECIFIC metrics for the restaurant's Google Business Profile (place id + Google's rating/reviews) were observed/refreshed. Carries ONLY data intrinsic to the Google listing — never general restaurant info (name/address/hours/phone/website/tags), which flows through Register/UpdateRestaurant. This keeps Sirene and Google feeding the same restaurant side-by-side with no cross-source dependency.
emitted by: 🎭 Restaurant
consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ Restaurant, 🗄️ ProspectionPipeline
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
googlePlaceId🔤 GooglePlaceId⬜ nullable
rating🔤 GoogleRating⬜ nullable
reviewsCountinteger⬜ nullable
▸Event: ⚡ RestaurantListingClaimed🔗 #event-restaurantlistingclaimed
An owner proved ownership of the listing (Google Business Profile verification) and claimed it.
emitted by: 🎭 Restaurant
consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ Restaurant
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
accountId🔤 RestaurantAccountId⬜ nullable
proofstring⬜ optionalReference to the accepted Google ownership proof (audit; the token itself is not stored).
▸Event: ⚡ RestaurantListingOptedOut🔗 #event-restaurantlistingoptedout

consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ Restaurant

restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
reasonstring⬜ nullable

▸Entity: 📦 OpeningHoursSlot🔗 #entity-openinghoursslot
One opening time window for a given weekday (HubRise opening_hours).
FieldTypeReq.Description
weekday🔤 Weekday✅ required
from🔤 TimeOfDay✅ required
to🔤 TimeOfDay✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 RestaurantContact🔗 #entity-restaurantcontact
Both fields optional: HubRise locations do not expose email/phone, so an imported restaurant starts without contact info, to be completed by the admin.
FieldTypeReq.Description
email🔤 EmailAddress⬜ nullable
phone🔤 PhoneNumber⬜ nullable
▸Entity: 📦 GeoPoint🔗 #entity-geopoint
WGS84 geographic coordinates of the restaurant location (e.g. from Google Maps, for map display & distance).
FieldTypeReq.Description
latitude🔤 Latitude✅ required
longitude🔤 Longitude✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 ExternalIdentifier🔗 #entity-externalidentifier
A generic external identifier kept on a Restaurant listing, preserving the ORIGINAL source key/value (e.g. siret/naf from INSEE Sirene, google_place_id from Google, hubrise_ref). Source-agnostic and multi-valued: a restaurant may carry several, and a key (e.g. siret) is NOT unique across restaurants.
FieldTypeReq.Description
key🔤 ExternalIdentifierKey✅ required
valuestring✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 Prospect🔗 #entity-prospect
Sales/CRM state of a NON_PARTNER restaurant listing being worked as a B2B prospect (ADR-0020). Id is the restaurantId (1:1). The prospection SCORE is NOT here — it is computed by the ProspectionPipeline projection, never stored. This holds only the outreach state.
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
pipelineStatus🔤 ProspectPipelineStatus✅ required
lastContactedAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
▸Entity: 📦 RestaurantAccount🔗 #entity-restaurantaccount
The business account that owns one or more restaurant locations (HubRise: restaurant).
FieldTypeReq.Description
id🔤 RestaurantAccountId✅ required
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullableHubRise restaurant (account) reference, when imported.
legalName🔤 RestaurantLegalName✅ required
contact📦 RestaurantContact✅ required
defaultCurrency🔤 CurrencyCode✅ required
defaultTaxRate📦 TaxRate✅ required
timezone🔤 TimeZone⬜ nullable
createdBy🔤 UserId✅ required
createdAtstring date-time✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 Restaurant🔗 #entity-restaurant
A single restaurant location (HubRise: location); belongs to a RestaurantAccount.
FieldTypeReq.Description
mode🔤 Mode⬜ optional
id🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
accountId🔤 RestaurantAccountId⬜ nullableThe owning RestaurantAccount; NULL for a non-partner listing (no account yet), set on claim/conversion.
listingStatus🔤 RestaurantListingStatus✅ requiredPartnership funnel: NON_PARTNER (seeded from open data) → PASSIVE_PARTNER → ACTIVE_PARTNER.
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullableHubRise location reference, when imported.
externalIdentifiers[📦 ExternalIdentifier]⬜ optionalSource-agnostic identifiers preserving original keys (siret/naf/google_place_id/hubrise_ref…). Not unique.
googlePlaceId🔤 GooglePlaceId⬜ nullableGoogle Place id, when known (enrichment / GBP).
slug🔤 Slug✅ required
displayName🔤 RestaurantDisplayName✅ required
contact📦 RestaurantContact⬜ nullableLocation-specific contact; falls back to the account contact when absent.
website🔤 WebUrl⬜ nullableRestaurant website (general restaurant info; any source may provide it).
tags[🔤 Tag]⬜ optionalCuisine/attribute tags (general restaurant info; source-agnostic).
marginRate🔤 MarginPercent⬜ nullableFood margin %, input to the Captain service-fee split (ADR-0017); null → 0 restaurant contribution.
cuisineCategory🔤 CuisineCategory⬜ nullableSINGLE primary cuisine, selects the Uber Eats estimate coefficient (ADR-0024); null → no estimate. Multi-cuisine discovery lives in `tags`.
uberPricesOptInboolean⬜ nullableThe restaurant authorized showing its real Uber Eats prices for comparison (ADR-0023 opt-in). Null/false → estimate only.
address📦 Address✅ required
location📦 GeoPoint⬜ nullableGeo coordinates (general restaurant info; typically from the Google Maps sync).
status🔤 RestaurantStatus✅ required
orderAcceptance🔤 OrderAcceptanceMode✅ required
timezone🔤 TimeZone⬜ nullableLocation timezone (a chain may span zones); falls back to the account timezone when absent.
preparationTimeMinutesinteger⬜ nullableBase preparation time (HubRise preparation_time).
openingHours[📦 OpeningHoursSlot]⬜ optional
createdBy🔤 UserId✅ required
createdAtstring date-time✅ required
🔤 Scalars (23)
ScalarTypeDescription
🔤 RestaurantAccountIdstring uuidRestaurant account (HubRise: restaurant) — groups one or more Restaurant locations.
🔤 UserIdstring uuid
🔤 ExternalIdentifierKeystringKey of a generic external identifier kept on a Restaurant listing (see entities.yaml#/ExternalIdentifier). Open vocabulary preserving the ORIGINAL source key; well-known values: 'siret', 'naf', 'google_place_id', 'hubrise_ref'. NOTE: external ids are NOT assumed unique — one SIRET can host several dark-kitchen brands; cross-reference sources (a google_place_id usually distinguishes them).
🔤 GooglePlaceIdstringGoogle Maps Place id identifying the establishment (enrichment / Business Profile).
🔤 LatitudenumberWGS84 latitude in decimal degrees.
🔤 LongitudenumberWGS84 longitude in decimal degrees.
🔤 GoogleRatingnumberGoogle Maps / Business Profile average rating (0–5), enrichment only.
🔤 WebUrlstring ^https?://An http(s) URL — restaurant website or the Google Business Profile 'Order online' link.
🔤 RestaurantLegalNamestringLegal entity name used for invoices and contracts. Example: 'SARL CHEZ MARCO', 'TOKYO SUSHI RESTAURATION SAS'.
🔤 CityNamestring
🔤 MarginPercentnumberA restaurant's food margin (%), input to the proportional Captain service fee (ADR-0016/0017): the restaurant's variable contribution scales with clamp((margin−55)/(70−55),0,1). Example: 62.0.
🔤 Weekdayenum (MONDAY | TUESDAY | WEDNESDAY | THURSDAY | FRIDAY | SATURDAY | SUNDAY)
🔤 TimeOfDaystring ^([01][0-9]|2[0-3]):[0-5][0-9]$Local time of day, HH:mm (HubRise opening_hours format).
🔤 RestaurantStatusenum (DRAFT | ACTIVE | INACTIVE)
🔤 RestaurantListingStatusenum (NON_PARTNER | PASSIVE_PARTNER | ACTIVE_PARTNER)Partnership funnel of a restaurant LISTING, orthogonal to RestaurantStatus (the operational DRAFT/ACTIVE/INACTIVE state). Orderable ⇔ ACTIVE_PARTNER + RestaurantStatus ACTIVE + acceptance ≠ PAUSED.
🔤 GbpLinkStatusenum (UNSET | CONFIGURED | VERIFIED | BROKEN)State of the restaurant's Google Business Profile 'Order online' link to {slug}.captain.food (ADR-0021; V1).
🔤 ProspectionScoreintegerB2B prospection priority (0–10), COMPUTED by the ProspectionPipeline projection from listing facts (ADR-0020) — never stored in an event.
🔤 ProspectPipelineStatusenum (NEW | CONTACTED | COLD | REPLIED | CONVERTED)Prospect funnel stage, DERIVED in the pipeline projection: NEW (no contact) → CONTACTED → COLD (J+21) / REPLIED, and CONVERTED when the restaurant reaches ACTIVE_PARTNER.
🔤 OutreachChannelenum (EMAIL | SLACK | PHONE)Channel of a prospection contact (email via Resend, Slack alert, or phone).
🔤 OrderAcceptanceModeenum (NORMAL | BUSY | PAUSED)Current order acceptance mode of a restaurant (HubRise: order_acceptance).
🔤 PriceRangeenum (BUDGET | MODERATE | PREMIUM)Coarse price tier of a restaurant, used as a discovery filter (UI: $ / $$ / $$$).
🔤 CuisineCategoryenum (FAST_FOOD | PIZZA | TRADITIONAL | BISTRONOMIC | FOOD_TRUCK)A restaurant's SINGLE primary/representative cuisine bucket, used only to select ONE Uber Eats mark-up coefficient in View_UberEstimationPolicy (ADR-0024): FAST_FOOD 1.30, PIZZA 1.35, TRADITIONAL 1.40, BISTRONOMIC 1.45, FOOD_TRUCK 1.35. NOT for discovery — a restaurant may belong to several cuisines for browsing/filtering; that is the multi-valued `Restaurant.tags`. This is deliberately one value because the estimate needs a single coefficient.
🔤 RestaurantListKeyenum (ORDER_AGAIN | RECOMMENDED | TOP_DEALS | GREEN_PACKAGING)Named, read-side-curated/personalized discovery shelf for the restaurants query. The read model resolves the actual member restaurants (editorial rules / customer history); the client just asks for a list by key.
⛔ Errors (13)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
⛔ RestaurantAccountNotFoundNo restaurant account with this id (e.g. registering a location under a missing account).🇬🇧 Restaurant account not found.🇫🇷 Compte restaurant introuvable.📩 UpdateRestaurantAccount, 📩 DeleteRestaurantAccount, 📩 RegisterRestaurant
⛔ SlugAlreadyTakenAnother restaurant already uses this slug.🇬🇧 The address '{slug}' is already taken.🇫🇷 L'adresse '{slug}' est déjà utilisée.📩 RegisterRestaurant
⛔ RefAlreadyUsedThe external reference (idempotent import key) is already owned by another aggregate.🇬🇧 The reference '{ref}' is already in use.🇫🇷 La référence '{ref}' est déjà utilisée.📩 RegisterRestaurantAccount, 📩 RegisterRestaurant
⛔ InvalidCurrencyCurrency is not a valid ISO 4217 code.🇬🇧 '{currency}' is not a valid currency.🇫🇷 '{currency}' n'est pas une devise valide.📩 RegisterRestaurantAccount
⛔ RestaurantNotActiveOperation requires an ACTIVE restaurant.🇬🇧 The restaurant '{restaurantName}' is not active.🇫🇷 Le restaurant '{restaurantName}' n'est pas actif.📩 ChangeOrderAcceptanceMode
⛔ RestaurantNotReadyForActivationActivation requires at least one catalog with one orderable offer.🇬🇧 Add at least one orderable product before activating '{restaurantName}'.🇫🇷 Ajoutez au moins un produit commandable avant d'activer '{restaurantName}'.📩 ActivateRestaurant
⛔ AcceptanceModeUnchangedRequested acceptance mode equals the current one.🇬🇧 '{restaurantName}' is already in '{mode}' mode.🇫🇷 '{restaurantName}' est déjà en mode '{mode}'.📩 ChangeOrderAcceptanceMode
⛔ ListingAlreadyClaimedThe restaurant listing has already been claimed by an owner.🇬🇧 This restaurant listing has already been claimed.🇫🇷 Cette fiche restaurant a déjà été revendiquée.📩 ClaimRestaurantListing
⛔ ListingOwnershipNotVerifiedCould not verify ownership of the listing (Google Business Profile proof rejected).🇬🇧 We couldn't verify that you own this restaurant. Please confirm via your Google Business Profile.🇫🇷 Nous n'avons pas pu vérifier que ce restaurant vous appartient. Confirmez via votre fiche Google Business Profile.📩 ClaimRestaurantListing, 📩 OptOutRestaurantListing
⛔ GbpOrderLinkNotConfiguredNo Google Business Profile 'Order online' link is configured to verify.🇬🇧 Configure the Google 'Order online' link before verifying it.🇫🇷 Configurez le lien Google « Commander en ligne » avant de le vérifier.📩 VerifyGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink
⛔ ProspectContactLimitReachedThe prospect already received the maximum number of outreach contacts (anti-spam: ≤ 3).🇬🇧 This prospect has already been contacted the maximum number of times.🇫🇷 Ce prospect a déjà été contacté le nombre maximum de fois.📩 RecordProspectContact
⛔ ProspectContactedTooRecentlyA new contact is too soon after the previous one (anti-spam: ≥ 7 days apart).🇬🇧 This prospect was contacted too recently; wait before contacting again.🇫🇷 Ce prospect a été contacté trop récemment ; patientez avant de le recontacter.📩 RecordProspectContact
⛔ ProspectNotFoundNo prospect (contact history) exists for this restaurant.🇬🇧 Prospect not found.🇫🇷 Prospect introuvable.📩 MarkProspectCold, 📩 RecordProspectReply
📐 Business rules (19)
▸Rule: 📐 AccountRegistrationValidCurrencyUniqueRef🔗 #rule-accountregistrationvalidcurrencyuniqueref
A restaurant account is registered only with a valid ISO currency and a not-already-used external ref.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantAccountRegistered, 🧪 TestRestaurantAccountRegisterIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 AccountUpdateRequiresExistingAccountAndField🔗 #rule-accountupdaterequiresexistingaccountandfield
Account-level fields update only for an existing account and when at least one editable field is provided.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantAccountUpdated, 🧪 TestRestaurantAccountUpdateIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 AccountDeletion🔗 #rule-accountdeletion
A restaurant account can be deleted.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantAccountDeleted
▸Rule: 📐 LocationRegistrationUnderAccountUniqueSlug🔗 #rule-locationregistrationunderaccountuniqueslug
A location is registered under an existing account with a unique slug and a not-already-used external ref.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantLocationRegistered, 🧪 TestRestaurantRegisterIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 RestaurantActivationVisibility🔗 #rule-restaurantactivationvisibility
Activating a restaurant makes it visible/orderable; activation is rejected from an invalid state.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantActivated, 🧪 TestRestaurantActivateIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 RestaurantActivationIdempotent🔗 #rule-restaurantactivationidempotent
Re-activating an already-active restaurant is a no-op (idempotent).
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantActivateAgainIsNoOp
▸Rule: 📐 RestaurantLocationFieldsUpdate🔗 #rule-restaurantlocationfieldsupdate
Editable location fields can be updated; an update to a missing location or with no field is rejected.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantUpdated, 🧪 TestRestaurantUpdateIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 RestaurantDeactivation🔗 #rule-restaurantdeactivation
A restaurant can be deactivated (hidden from customers).
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantDeactivated
▸Rule: 📐 OrderAcceptanceModeManagement🔗 #rule-orderacceptancemodemanagement
The order-acceptance mode reflects kitchen capacity and is rejected from an invalid state.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantAcceptanceModeChanged, 🧪 TestRestaurantAcceptanceModeIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 RestaurantRemoval🔗 #rule-restaurantremoval
A restaurant location can be removed.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantRemoved
▸Rule: 📐 ListingSeededFromOpenData🔗 #rule-listingseededfromopendata
A public NON_PARTNER listing can be seeded from open data (Sirene/Google) with no account, preserving source identifiers.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantSeededFromSync
▸Rule: 📐 GoogleBusinessProfileEnrichment🔗 #rule-googlebusinessprofileenrichment
Google Business Profile data (rating/reviews/hours…) is stored separately from the restaurant's own info.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated
▸Rule: 📐 ClosedListingSyncedFromSource🔗 #rule-closedlistingsyncedfromsource
A listing reported closed by the source is marked closed.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantMarkedClosed
▸Rule: 📐 ListingClaimRequiresVerifiedOwnership🔗 #rule-listingclaimrequiresverifiedownership
A listing can be claimed only with verified ownership, and only once.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantListingClaimed, 🧪 TestRestaurantListingClaimUnverifiedIsRejected, 🧪 TestRestaurantListingClaimAgainIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 ListingOptOut🔗 #rule-listingoptout
A restaurant can opt a listing out.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantListingOptedOut
▸Rule: 📐 ListingFunnelProgression🔗 #rule-listingfunnelprogression
A listing progresses through the partnership funnel (NON_PARTNER → PASSIVE_PARTNER → ACTIVE_PARTNER).
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantListingStatusChanged
▸Rule: 📐 GbpOrderLinkSetupAndVerification🔗 #rule-gbporderlinksetupandverification
The Google 'Order online' link can be configured and verified; verification is rejected when it fails.
verified by: 🧪 TestRestaurantGbpOrderLinkConfigured, 🧪 TestRestaurantGbpOrderLinkVerified, 🧪 TestRestaurantGbpOrderLinkVerifyIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 ProspectContactScheduleAndLimit🔗 #rule-prospectcontactscheduleandlimit
A prospect contact is recorded only within the outreach schedule and under the contact limit.
verified by: 🧪 TestProspectContacted, 🧪 TestProspectContactedTooRecently, 🧪 TestProspectContactLimitReached
▸Rule: 📐 ProspectOutreachStateTransitions🔗 #rule-prospectoutreachstatetransitions
A prospect can be marked cold or replied; acting on a missing prospect is rejected.
verified by: 🧪 TestProspectMarkedCold, 🧪 TestProspectReplied, 🧪 TestProspectMarkColdNotFound
🧪 Tests (3)

🎭 RestaurantAccount

▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantAccountRegistered🔗 #test-testrestaurantaccountregistered
Registers a restaurant account
given: (none)
when: 📩 RegisterRestaurantAccount
then: ⚡ RestaurantAccountRegistered
verifies: 📐 AccountRegistrationValidCurrencyUniqueRef
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantAccountRegisterIsRejected🔗 #test-testrestaurantaccountregisterisrejected
Rejects registering an account with an invalid currency or an already-used external ref
given: (none)
when: 📩 RegisterRestaurantAccount
thrown: ⛔ InvalidCurrency, ⛔ RefAlreadyUsed
verifies: 📐 AccountRegistrationValidCurrencyUniqueRef
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantAccountUpdated🔗 #test-testrestaurantaccountupdated
Updates account-level fields (legal name)
given: ⚡ RestaurantAccountRegistered
when: 📩 UpdateRestaurantAccount
then: ⚡ RestaurantAccountUpdated
verifies: 📐 AccountUpdateRequiresExistingAccountAndField
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantAccountUpdateIsRejected🔗 #test-testrestaurantaccountupdateisrejected
Rejects updating a missing account or an update with no editable field
given: (none)
when: 📩 UpdateRestaurantAccount
thrown: ⛔ RestaurantAccountNotFound, ⛔ NoEditableFieldProvided
verifies: 📐 AccountUpdateRequiresExistingAccountAndField
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantAccountDeleted🔗 #test-testrestaurantaccountdeleted
Deletes a restaurant account
given: ⚡ RestaurantAccountRegistered
when: 📩 DeleteRestaurantAccount
then: ⚡ RestaurantAccountDeleted
verifies: 📐 AccountDeletion

🎭 Restaurant

▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantLocationRegistered🔗 #test-testrestaurantlocationregistered
Registers a location under an existing account
given: ⚡ RestaurantAccountRegistered
when: 📩 RegisterRestaurant
then: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
verifies: 📐 LocationRegistrationUnderAccountUniqueSlug
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantRegisterIsRejected🔗 #test-testrestaurantregisterisrejected
Rejects registering a location when the account is missing, the slug is taken, or the external ref is already used
given: (none)
when: 📩 RegisterRestaurant
thrown: ⛔ RestaurantAccountNotFound, ⛔ SlugAlreadyTaken, ⛔ RefAlreadyUsed
verifies: 📐 LocationRegistrationUnderAccountUniqueSlug
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantActivated🔗 #test-testrestaurantactivated
Activates a registered restaurant
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 ActivateRestaurant
then: ⚡ RestaurantActivated
verifies: 📐 RestaurantActivationVisibility
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantActivateAgainIsNoOp🔗 #test-testrestaurantactivateagainisnoop
Re-activating an already-active restaurant is a no-op (idempotent)
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantActivated
when: 📩 ActivateRestaurant
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: 📐 RestaurantActivationIdempotent
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantActivateIsRejected🔗 #test-testrestaurantactivateisrejected
Rejects activating a missing restaurant or one with no orderable offer
given: (none)
when: 📩 ActivateRestaurant
thrown: ⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ RestaurantNotReadyForActivation
verifies: 📐 RestaurantActivationVisibility
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantUpdated🔗 #test-testrestaurantupdated
Updates editable location fields (display name)
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 UpdateRestaurant
then: ⚡ RestaurantUpdated
verifies: 📐 RestaurantLocationFieldsUpdate
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantUpdateIsRejected🔗 #test-testrestaurantupdateisrejected
Rejects updating a missing restaurant or an update with no editable field
given: (none)
when: 📩 UpdateRestaurant
thrown: ⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ NoEditableFieldProvided
verifies: 📐 RestaurantLocationFieldsUpdate
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantDeactivated🔗 #test-testrestaurantdeactivated
Deactivates an active restaurant
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantActivated
when: 📩 DeactivateRestaurant
then: ⚡ RestaurantDeactivated
verifies: 📐 RestaurantDeactivation
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantAcceptanceModeChanged🔗 #test-testrestaurantacceptancemodechanged
Switches an active restaurant to BUSY
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantActivated
when: 📩 ChangeOrderAcceptanceMode
then: ⚡ RestaurantAcceptanceModeChanged
verifies: 📐 OrderAcceptanceModeManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantAcceptanceModeIsRejected🔗 #test-testrestaurantacceptancemodeisrejected
Rejects changing acceptance mode when the restaurant is inactive or already in that mode
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 ChangeOrderAcceptanceMode
thrown: ⛔ RestaurantNotActive, ⛔ AcceptanceModeUnchanged
verifies: 📐 OrderAcceptanceModeManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantRemoved🔗 #test-testrestaurantremoved
Removes (delists) a location from its account
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 RemoveRestaurant
then: ⚡ RestaurantRemoved
verifies: 📐 RestaurantRemoval
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantSeededFromSync🔗 #test-testrestaurantseededfromsync
Sync ACL seeds a public NON_PARTNER listing (no account)
given: (none)
when: 📩 RegisterRestaurant
then: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
verifies: 📐 ListingSeededFromOpenData
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated🔗 #test-testrestaurantgooglebusinessprofileupdated
Records Google Business Profile enrichment
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile
then: ⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated
verifies: 📐 GoogleBusinessProfileEnrichment
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantMarkedClosed🔗 #test-testrestaurantmarkedclosed
Marks a listing closed (Sirene closure)
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 MarkRestaurantClosed
then: ⚡ RestaurantMarkedClosed
verifies: 📐 ClosedListingSyncedFromSource
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantListingClaimed🔗 #test-testrestaurantlistingclaimed
Owner claims a listing with a valid Google ownership proof
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 ClaimRestaurantListing
then: ⚡ RestaurantListingClaimed
verifies: 📐 ListingClaimRequiresVerifiedOwnership
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantListingClaimUnverifiedIsRejected🔗 #test-testrestaurantlistingclaimunverifiedisrejected
Rejects a claim whose Google ownership proof fails
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 ClaimRestaurantListing
thrown: ⛔ ListingOwnershipNotVerified
verifies: 📐 ListingClaimRequiresVerifiedOwnership
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantListingClaimAgainIsRejected🔗 #test-testrestaurantlistingclaimagainisrejected
Rejects claiming an already-claimed listing
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantListingClaimed
when: 📩 ClaimRestaurantListing
thrown: ⛔ ListingAlreadyClaimed
verifies: 📐 ListingClaimRequiresVerifiedOwnership
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantListingOptedOut🔗 #test-testrestaurantlistingoptedout
Owner opts a listing out (proven via GBP)
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 OptOutRestaurantListing
then: ⚡ RestaurantListingOptedOut
verifies: 📐 ListingOptOut
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantListingStatusChanged🔗 #test-testrestaurantlistingstatuschanged
Admin moves a listing along the partnership funnel
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 ChangeRestaurantListingStatus
then: ⚡ RestaurantListingStatusChanged
verifies: 📐 ListingFunnelProgression
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantGbpOrderLinkConfigured🔗 #test-testrestaurantgbporderlinkconfigured
Configures the Google 'Order online' link
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 ConfigureGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink
then: ⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkConfigured
verifies: 📐 GbpOrderLinkSetupAndVerification
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantGbpOrderLinkVerified🔗 #test-testrestaurantgbporderlinkverified
Verifies the configured Google 'Order online' link
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkConfigured
when: 📩 VerifyGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink
then: ⚡ RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkVerified
verifies: 📐 GbpOrderLinkSetupAndVerification
▸Test: 🧪 TestRestaurantGbpOrderLinkVerifyIsRejected🔗 #test-testrestaurantgbporderlinkverifyisrejected
Rejects verifying when no order link is configured
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 VerifyGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink
thrown: ⛔ GbpOrderLinkNotConfigured
verifies: 📐 GbpOrderLinkSetupAndVerification

🎭 Prospect

▸Test: 🧪 TestProspectContacted🔗 #test-testprospectcontacted
Records the first prospection contact (prospect is born)
given: (none)
when: 📩 RecordProspectContact
then: ⚡ ProspectContacted
verifies: 📐 ProspectContactScheduleAndLimit
▸Test: 🧪 TestProspectContactedTooRecently🔗 #test-testprospectcontactedtoorecently
Rejects a new contact too soon after the previous one (≥7 days apart)
given: ⚡ ProspectContacted
when: 📩 RecordProspectContact
thrown: ⛔ ProspectContactedTooRecently
verifies: 📐 ProspectContactScheduleAndLimit
▸Test: 🧪 TestProspectContactLimitReached🔗 #test-testprospectcontactlimitreached
Rejects a 4th contact (anti-spam: ≤ 3)
given: ⚡ ProspectContacted, ⚡ ProspectContacted, ⚡ ProspectContacted
when: 📩 RecordProspectContact
thrown: ⛔ ProspectContactLimitReached
verifies: 📐 ProspectContactScheduleAndLimit
▸Test: 🧪 TestProspectMarkedCold🔗 #test-testprospectmarkedcold
Marks a contacted prospect cold
given: ⚡ ProspectContacted
when: 📩 MarkProspectCold
then: ⚡ ProspectMarkedCold
verifies: 📐 ProspectOutreachStateTransitions
▸Test: 🧪 TestProspectReplied🔗 #test-testprospectreplied
Records a prospect reply
given: ⚡ ProspectContacted
when: 📩 RecordProspectReply
then: ⚡ ProspectReplied
verifies: 📐 ProspectOutreachStateTransitions
▸Test: 🧪 TestProspectMarkColdNotFound🔗 #test-testprospectmarkcoldnotfound
Rejects marking cold a prospect that was never contacted
given: (none)
when: 📩 MarkProspectCold
thrown: ⛔ ProspectNotFound
verifies: 📐 ProspectOutreachStateTransitions
📡 Observability (1)
▸Contract: 📡 prospection🔗 #obs-prospection
criticality: medium
workflow: · command 📩 RecordProspectContact
emits: ⚡ ProspectContacted · inbound: —
run identity
IdSourceReq.Business key
correlation_idcommand.correlation_id✅—
trace_idotel.trace_id✅—
restaurant_iddomain.aggregate_id✅🔤 RestaurantId
spans (* = required attribute)
SpanKindReq.MultiplicityAttributes
pipeline.readINTERNAL✅—business.score*
outreach.dispatchCLIENT✅—messaging.system*, business.channel*, business.sequence_step*
command.receiveSERVER✅—business.command_type*
event.store.appendINTERNAL✅—business.event_type*

metrics: prospect_contact_duration_ms (histogram) · business: prospect_contacts_sent_total (counter), prospects_converted_total (counter), prospects_cold_total (counter)
success ⇐ spans: pipeline.read, outreach.dispatch, event.store.append, event.publish
SLOs: p95 ≤ 2000ms · p99 ≤ 5000ms · error ≤ 5%
🔲 2. catalog 🔗
Catalog tree, products, offers (SKUs), option lists, per-offer stock; HubRise import.
🧰 API operations (14)
▸Query: 🔎 catalog🔗 #query-catalog
A restaurant's full catalog (categories → products → offers + option lists).
input: 🧩 CatalogQueryInput! { restaurantId: 🔤 RestaurantId }
returns: 🧩 Catalog · reads 🗄️ Catalog
roles: EVERYONE (open — roles omitted) · V0
▸Query: 🔎 categories🔗 #query-categories
The category tree of a restaurant's catalog (for filtering & product discovery). Derived from Catalog.tree — categories are not a separate aggregate, so there is no dedicated view.
input: 🧩 CategoriesQueryInput! { restaurantId: 🔤 RestaurantId }
returns: 🧩 CatalogCategory [] · reads 🗄️ Catalog
roles: EVERYONE (open — roles omitted) · V0

command: 📩 CreateCatalog → 🎭 Catalog
roles: ADMIN, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT · V0

A restaurant's catalog (categories → products → offers + option lists).

🎭 Actors (1)
▸Actor: 🎭 Catalog🔗 #actor-catalog
A restaurant catalog: catalog, category tree, products, offers (SKUs), option lists and per-offer stock.
🧩 aggregate
ReceivesEmits →Throws
📩 CreateCatalog⚡ CatalogCreated⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ RefNotUnique
📩 AddProduct⚡ ProductAdded⛔ CatalogNotFound, ⛔ CurrencyMismatch, ⛔ CatalogCategoryRefNotFound, ⛔ RefNotUnique
📩 UpdateProduct⚡ ProductUpdated⛔ ProductNotFound, ⛔ ProductMustHaveOffer, ⛔ CurrencyMismatch
📩 RemoveProduct⚡ ProductRemoved⛔ ProductNotFound
📩 AddCatalogCategory⚡ CatalogCategoryAdded⛔ CatalogNotFound, ⛔ ParentCatalogCategoryNotFound, ⛔ RefNotUnique
📩 UpdateCatalogCategory⚡ CatalogCategoryUpdated⛔ CatalogCategoryNotFound, ⛔ CatalogCategoryCycle
📩 RemoveCatalogCategory⚡ CatalogCategoryRemoved⛔ CatalogCategoryNotFound, ⛔ CatalogCategoryNotEmpty
📩 AddOptionList⚡ OptionListAdded⛔ CatalogNotFound, ⛔ OptionListMustHaveOption, ⛔ InvalidSelectionBounds
📩 UpdateOptionList⚡ OptionListUpdated⛔ OptionListNotFound, ⛔ OptionListMustHaveOption
📩 RemoveOptionList⚡ OptionListRemoved⛔ OptionListNotFound, ⛔ OptionListInUse
📩 UpdateOfferStock⚡ OfferStockUpdated⛔ OfferNotFound, ⛔ OfferNotStockTracked
📩 ImportCatalog⚡ CatalogImported⛔ CatalogNotFound, ⛔ CatalogTranslationFailed, ⛔ MissingRef
⚡ OfferStockUpdated⚡ OfferStockUpdated—
🗄️ Views (1)
▸View: 🗄️ Catalog🔗 #view-catalog
source: 🎭 Catalog · 🛶 V0
fed by: ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ CatalogCategoryAdded, ⚡ CatalogCategoryUpdated, ⚡ CatalogCategoryRemoved, ⚡ ProductAdded, ⚡ ProductUpdated, ⚡ ProductRemoved, ⚡ OptionListAdded, ⚡ OptionListUpdated, ⚡ OptionListRemoved, ⚡ OfferStockUpdated, ⚡ CatalogImported
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
catalog_id🔤 CatalogId (derived)⚡ CatalogCreated.catalogIdPK
restaurant_id🔤 RestaurantId (derived) → 🗄️ Restaurant⚡ CatalogCreated.restaurantIdindex
slug🔤 Slug⚠️ none—⚠️ HOLE: CatalogCreated carries no slug — nothing populates this column (drop it or add slug to the event).
name🔤 CatalogName (derived)⚡ CatalogCreated.name—
treejsonb⚡ CatalogCategoryAdded, ⚡ CatalogCategoryUpdated, ⚡ CatalogCategoryRemoved, ⚡ ProductAdded, ⚡ ProductUpdated, ⚡ ProductRemoved, ⚡ OptionListAdded, ⚡ OptionListUpdated, ⚡ OptionListRemoved, ⚡ OfferStockUpdated, ⚡ CatalogImported—Assembled tree: categories -> products -> offers { price_cents, currency, availability, stock_status, uberPrice?, uberPriceBasis? } + option lists. See rules for how uberPrice is derived (ADR-0022/0024).
created_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
updated_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
📩 Commands (12)
▸Command: 📩 CreateCatalog🔗 #command-createcatalog
Admin creates a catalog for a restaurant.
dispatched by: ✏️ createCatalog · handled by 🎭 Catalog
emits: ⚡ CatalogCreated
throws: ⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ RefNotUnique
FieldTypeReq.Description
catalogId🔤 CatalogId✅ requiredClient-generated id for the new catalog.
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
name🔤 CatalogName✅ required
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
▸Command: 📩 AddProduct🔗 #command-addproduct
Admin adds a product (with its one-or-more offers) to a catalog. The client supplies the product id and each offer id (client-generated).
dispatched by: ✏️ addProduct · handled by 🎭 Catalog
emits: ⚡ ProductAdded
throws: ⛔ CatalogNotFound, ⛔ CurrencyMismatch, ⛔ CatalogCategoryRefNotFound, ⛔ RefNotUnique
FieldTypeReq.Description
productId🔤 ProductId✅ requiredClient-generated id for the new product.
catalogId🔤 CatalogId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
categoryRef🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
name🔤 ProductName✅ required
description🔤 ProductDescription⬜ nullable
tags[🔤 Tag]⬜ optional
taxRate📦 TaxRate✅ required
offers[📦 Offer]✅ required
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
▸Command: 📩 UpdateProduct🔗 #command-updateproduct
Admin updates an existing product (full replace, including offers).
dispatched by: ✏️ updateProduct · handled by 🎭 Catalog
emits: ⚡ ProductUpdated
throws: ⛔ ProductNotFound, ⛔ ProductMustHaveOffer, ⛔ CurrencyMismatch
FieldTypeReq.Description
catalogId🔤 CatalogId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
product📦 Product✅ required
▸Command: 📩 RemoveProduct🔗 #command-removeproduct
Admin removes a product from a catalog.
dispatched by: ✏️ removeProduct · handled by 🎭 Catalog
emits: ⚡ ProductRemoved
throws: ⛔ ProductNotFound
FieldTypeReq.Description
catalogId🔤 CatalogId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
productId🔤 ProductId✅ required
▸Command: 📩 AddCatalogCategory🔗 #command-addcatalogcategory

throws: ⛔ CatalogNotFound, ⛔ ParentCatalogCategoryNotFound, ⛔ RefNotUnique

catalogId🔤 CatalogId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
category📦 CatalogCategory✅ required

▸Command: 📩 UpdateOfferStock🔗 #command-updateofferstock
Admin (or inventory sync) sets the stock level of a offer. The StockStatus is derived server-side from quantity vs lowStockThreshold.
dispatched by: ✏️ updateOfferStock · handled by 🎭 Catalog
emits: ⚡ OfferStockUpdated
throws: ⛔ OfferNotFound, ⛔ OfferNotStockTracked
FieldTypeReq.Description
catalogId🔤 CatalogId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
offerId🔤 OfferId✅ required
quantity🔤 Quantity✅ required
lowStockThreshold🔤 Quantity⬜ nullable
expiresAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
▸Command: 📩 ImportCatalog🔗 #command-importcatalog
Admin/system imports or re-syncs a full catalog from an external source (HubRise), replacing the current catalog content. Idempotent via entity `ref`s (HubRise import key).
dispatched by: ✏️ importCatalog · handled by 🎭 Catalog
emits: ⚡ CatalogImported
throws: ⛔ CatalogNotFound, ⛔ CatalogTranslationFailed, ⛔ MissingRef
FieldTypeReq.Description
catalogId🔤 CatalogId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
sourcestring (HUBRISE | MANUAL)✅ required
categories[📦 CatalogCategory]✅ required
products[📦 Product]✅ required
optionLists[📦 OptionList]✅ required

A full catalog was imported/synced from an external source (e.g. HubRise), replacing the current catalog content for the restaurant.
emitted by: 🎭 Catalog
consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ Catalog
FieldTypeReq.Description
catalogId🔤 CatalogId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
sourcestring (HUBRISE | MANUAL)✅ required
categories[📦 CatalogCategory]✅ required
products[📦 Product]✅ required
optionLists[📦 OptionList]✅ required
📦 Entities (7)
▸Entity: 📦 Stock🔗 #entity-stock
Inventory of a offer/option. status is DERIVED from quantity and lowStockThreshold (see scalars.yaml#/StockStatus).
FieldTypeReq.Description
quantity🔤 Quantity✅ required
lowStockThreshold🔤 Quantity⬜ nullableIf quantity <= threshold, status becomes LOW_STOCK.
status🔤 StockStatus✅ requiredDERIVED server-side from quantity vs lowStockThreshold — never a client input.
expiresAtstring date-time⬜ nullableRestock/availability date for out-of-stock items (HubRise inventory expires_at).
▸Entity: 📦 Catalog🔗 #entity-catalog
A catalog (HubRise: catalog).
FieldTypeReq.Description
id🔤 CatalogId✅ required
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
name🔤 CatalogName✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 CatalogCategory🔗 #entity-catalogcategory
Catalog category, hierarchical via parentRef (HubRise categories tree).
FieldTypeReq.Description
id🔤 ProductCategoryId✅ required
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
catalogId🔤 CatalogId✅ required
parentRef🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullableNull for a top-level category.
name🔤 CatalogCategoryName✅ required
description🔤 ProductDescription⬜ nullable
tags[🔤 Tag]⬜ optional
imageIds[🔤 ImageId]⬜ optional
▸Entity: 📦 Product🔗 #entity-product
A catalog product grouping one or more offers (HubRise: product + SKUs).
FieldTypeReq.Description
id🔤 ProductId✅ required
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
catalogId🔤 CatalogId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
categoryRef🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
name🔤 ProductName✅ required
description🔤 ProductDescription⬜ nullable
tags[🔤 Tag]⬜ optional
imageIds[🔤 ImageId]⬜ optional
taxRate📦 TaxRate✅ required
offers[📦 Offer]✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 Offer🔗 #entity-offer
A purchasable offer of a product (HubRise: SKU).
FieldTypeReq.Description
id🔤 OfferId✅ required
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
productId🔤 ProductId✅ required
name🔤 OfferName✅ required
price📦 Money✅ required
availability🔤 CatalogItemAvailability✅ required
stock📦 Stock⬜ nullableNull when the offer is not stock-tracked.
optionListIds[🔤 OptionListId]⬜ optional
▸Entity: 📦 OptionList🔗 #entity-optionlist
FieldTypeReq.Description
id🔤 OptionListId✅ required
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
name🔤 OptionListName✅ required
minSelectionsinteger✅ required
maxSelectionsinteger⬜ nullableNull means unlimited.
multipleSelectionboolean✅ requiredWhether the same option can be selected more than once.
options[📦 ProductItemOption]✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 ProductItemOption🔗 #entity-productitemoption
FieldTypeReq.Description
id🔤 OptionId✅ required
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
optionListId🔤 OptionListId✅ required
name🔤 OptionName✅ required
price📦 Money✅ required
defaultboolean✅ required
availability🔤 CatalogItemAvailability✅ required
stock📦 Stock⬜ nullable
🔤 Scalars (10)
ScalarTypeDescription
🔤 CatalogIdstring uuidCatalog id (HubRise: catalog).
🔤 ProductCategoryIdstring uuid
🔤 OptionListIdstring uuid
🔤 ImageIdstring uuid
🔤 CatalogNamestring
🔤 CatalogCategoryNamestring
🔤 ProductDescriptionstring
🔤 OptionListNamestring
🔤 CatalogItemAvailabilityenum (AVAILABLE | UNAVAILABLE)
🔤 StockStatusenum (IN_STOCK | LOW_STOCK | OUT_OF_STOCK)
⛔ Errors (17)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
⛔ CatalogNotFoundNo catalog with this id (or it does not belong to the restaurant).🇬🇧 Catalog not found.🇫🇷 Catalog introuvable.📩 AddProduct, 📩 AddCatalogCategory, 📩 AddOptionList, 📩 ImportCatalog
⛔ CurrencyMismatchA offer price currency differs from the restaurant default currency.🇬🇧 Prices must use the currency of '{restaurantName}' ('{currency}').🇫🇷 Les prix doivent utiliser la devise de '{restaurantName}' ('{currency}').📩 AddProduct, 📩 UpdateProduct
⛔ RefNotUniqueThe ref is not unique within the catalog.🇬🇧 The reference '{ref}' is already used in this catalog.🇫🇷 La référence '{ref}' est déjà utilisée dans ce catalog.📩 CreateCatalog, 📩 AddProduct, 📩 AddCatalogCategory
⛔ CatalogCategoryNotFoundNo category with this id in the catalog.🇬🇧 CatalogCategory not found.🇫🇷 Catégorie introuvable.📩 UpdateCatalogCategory, 📩 RemoveCatalogCategory
⛔ CatalogCategoryRefNotFoundReferenced category ref does not exist in the catalog.🇬🇧 No category with reference '{ref}'.🇫🇷 Aucune catégorie avec la référence '{ref}'.📩 AddProduct
⛔ ParentCatalogCategoryNotFoundparentRef points to a category that does not exist in the catalog.🇬🇧 The parent category '{parentRef}' does not exist.🇫🇷 La catégorie parente '{parentRef}' n'existe pas.📩 AddCatalogCategory
⛔ CatalogCategoryCycleparentRef would introduce a cycle in the category tree.🇬🇧 Moving '{categoryName}' there would create a category loop.🇫🇷 Déplacer '{categoryName}' ici créerait une boucle de catégories.📩 UpdateCatalogCategory
⛔ CatalogCategoryNotEmptyCatalogCategory has child categories or products referencing it.🇬🇧 Empty the category '{categoryName}' before removing it.🇫🇷 Videz la catégorie '{categoryName}' avant de la supprimer.📩 RemoveCatalogCategory
⛔ ProductNotFoundNo product with this id in the catalog.🇬🇧 Product not found.🇫🇷 Produit introuvable.📩 UpdateProduct, 📩 RemoveProduct
⛔ ProductMustHaveOfferA product must keep at least one offer.🇬🇧 '{productName}' must keep at least one offer.🇫🇷 '{productName}' doit conserver au moins une offere.📩 UpdateProduct
⛔ OptionListNotFoundNo option list with this id in the catalog.🇬🇧 Option list not found.🇫🇷 Liste d'options introuvable.📩 UpdateOptionList, 📩 RemoveOptionList
⛔ OptionListMustHaveOptionAn option list must keep at least one option.🇬🇧 The option list '{optionListName}' must have at least one option.🇫🇷 La liste d'options '{optionListName}' doit contenir au moins une option.📩 AddOptionList, 📩 UpdateOptionList
⛔ InvalidSelectionBoundsminSelections is greater than maxSelections.🇬🇧 In '{optionListName}', the minimum cannot exceed the maximum number of selections.🇫🇷 Dans '{optionListName}', le minimum ne peut pas dépasser le maximum de sélections.📩 AddOptionList
⛔ OptionListInUseOption list is still referenced by a offer and cannot be removed.🇬🇧 The option list '{optionListName}' is still used by a product.🇫🇷 La liste d'options '{optionListName}' est encore utilisée par un produit.📩 RemoveOptionList
⛔ OfferNotStockTrackedOffer is not stock-tracked, so its stock cannot be set.🇬🇧 '{productName}' ({offerName}) does not track stock.🇫🇷 '{productName}' ({offerName}) ne suit pas de stock.📩 UpdateOfferStock
⛔ CatalogTranslationFailedThe ACL could not map external (HubRise) shapes to domain types on import.🇬🇧 The imported catalog could not be processed.🇫🇷 Le catalogue importé n'a pas pu être traité.📩 ImportCatalog
⛔ MissingRefAn imported entity is missing its ref (idempotency key).🇬🇧 Every imported item must have a reference.🇫🇷 Chaque élément importé doit avoir une référence.📩 ImportCatalog
📐 Business rules (6)
▸Rule: 📐 CatalogCreationForRestaurant🔗 #rule-catalogcreationforrestaurant
A catalog is created for a restaurant; creation is rejected when invalid/duplicate.
verified by: 🧪 TestCatalogCreated, 🧪 TestCatalogCreateIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 CatalogProductManagement🔗 #rule-catalogproductmanagement
Products can be added, updated and removed in a catalog, with rejection on invalid operations.
verified by: 🧪 TestCatalogProductAdded, 🧪 TestCatalogAddProductIsRejected, 🧪 TestCatalogProductUpdated, 🧪 TestCatalogUpdateProductIsRejected, 🧪 TestCatalogProductRemoved
▸Rule: 📐 CatalogCategoryTreeManagement🔗 #rule-catalogcategorytreemanagement
Catalog categories (the tree) can be added, updated and removed, with rejection on invalid operations.
verified by: 🧪 TestCatalogCategoryAdded, 🧪 TestCatalogAddCategoryIsRejected, 🧪 TestCatalogCategoryUpdated, 🧪 TestCatalogUpdateCategoryIsRejected, 🧪 TestCatalogCategoryRemoved, 🧪 TestCatalogRemoveCategoryIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 CatalogOptionListManagement🔗 #rule-catalogoptionlistmanagement
Option lists can be added, updated and removed, with rejection on invalid operations.
verified by: 🧪 TestCatalogOptionListAdded, 🧪 TestCatalogAddOptionListIsRejected, 🧪 TestCatalogOptionListUpdated, 🧪 TestCatalogUpdateOptionListIsRejected, 🧪 TestCatalogOptionListRemoved, 🧪 TestCatalogRemoveOptionListIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 OfferStockManualOrSynced🔗 #rule-offerstockmanualorsynced
Offer stock can be updated manually or synced from HubRise; an invalid update is rejected.
verified by: 🧪 TestCatalogOfferStockUpdated, 🧪 TestCatalogUpdateOfferStockIsRejected, 🧪 TestCatalogOfferStockSyncedFromHubRise
▸Rule: 📐 CatalogImportReplacesContent🔗 #rule-catalogimportreplacescontent
A HubRise catalog import replaces the catalog content (idempotent on ref); an invalid import is rejected.
verified by: 🧪 TestCatalogImported, 🧪 TestCatalogImportIsRejected
🧪 Tests (1)

🎭 Catalog

▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogCreated🔗 #test-testcatalogcreated
Creates a catalog for a registered restaurant
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 CreateCatalog
then: ⚡ CatalogCreated
verifies: 📐 CatalogCreationForRestaurant
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogCreateIsRejected🔗 #test-testcatalogcreateisrejected
Rejects creating a catalog for a missing restaurant or with a duplicate ref
given: (none)
when: 📩 CreateCatalog
thrown: ⛔ RestaurantNotFound, ⛔ RefNotUnique
verifies: 📐 CatalogCreationForRestaurant
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogProductAdded🔗 #test-testcatalogproductadded
Adds a product with one offer to a catalog
given: ⚡ CatalogCreated
when: 📩 AddProduct
then: ⚡ ProductAdded
verifies: 📐 CatalogProductManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogAddProductIsRejected🔗 #test-testcatalogaddproductisrejected
Rejects adding a product when the catalog/category is missing, a price currency mismatches, or a ref is duplicated
given: (none)
when: 📩 AddProduct
thrown: ⛔ CatalogNotFound, ⛔ CurrencyMismatch, ⛔ CatalogCategoryRefNotFound, ⛔ RefNotUnique
verifies: 📐 CatalogProductManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogProductUpdated🔗 #test-testcatalogproductupdated
Updates an existing product (full replace)
given: ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ ProductAdded
when: 📩 UpdateProduct
then: ⚡ ProductUpdated
verifies: 📐 CatalogProductManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogUpdateProductIsRejected🔗 #test-testcatalogupdateproductisrejected
Rejects updating a missing product, removing its last offer, or mismatching the currency
given: (none)
when: 📩 UpdateProduct
thrown: ⛔ ProductNotFound, ⛔ ProductMustHaveOffer, ⛔ CurrencyMismatch
verifies: 📐 CatalogProductManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogProductRemoved🔗 #test-testcatalogproductremoved
Removes a product from a catalog
given: ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ ProductAdded
when: 📩 RemoveProduct
then: ⚡ ProductRemoved
verifies: 📐 CatalogProductManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogCategoryAdded🔗 #test-testcatalogcategoryadded
Adds a category to a catalog
given: ⚡ CatalogCreated
when: 📩 AddCatalogCategory
then: ⚡ CatalogCategoryAdded
verifies: 📐 CatalogCategoryTreeManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogAddCategoryIsRejected🔗 #test-testcatalogaddcategoryisrejected
Rejects adding a category when the catalog/parent is missing or the ref is duplicated
given: (none)
when: 📩 AddCatalogCategory
thrown: ⛔ CatalogNotFound, ⛔ ParentCatalogCategoryNotFound, ⛔ RefNotUnique
verifies: 📐 CatalogCategoryTreeManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogCategoryUpdated🔗 #test-testcatalogcategoryupdated
Updates a catalog category (full replace)
given: ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ CatalogCategoryAdded
when: 📩 UpdateCatalogCategory
then: ⚡ CatalogCategoryUpdated
verifies: 📐 CatalogCategoryTreeManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogUpdateCategoryIsRejected🔗 #test-testcatalogupdatecategoryisrejected
Rejects updating a missing category or one that would create a cycle
given: (none)
when: 📩 UpdateCatalogCategory
thrown: ⛔ CatalogCategoryNotFound, ⛔ CatalogCategoryCycle
verifies: 📐 CatalogCategoryTreeManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogCategoryRemoved🔗 #test-testcatalogcategoryremoved
Removes a category from a catalog
given: ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ CatalogCategoryAdded
when: 📩 RemoveCatalogCategory
then: ⚡ CatalogCategoryRemoved
verifies: 📐 CatalogCategoryTreeManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogRemoveCategoryIsRejected🔗 #test-testcatalogremovecategoryisrejected
Rejects removing a missing category or one that still has children/products
given: (none)
when: 📩 RemoveCatalogCategory
thrown: ⛔ CatalogCategoryNotFound, ⛔ CatalogCategoryNotEmpty
verifies: 📐 CatalogCategoryTreeManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogOptionListAdded🔗 #test-testcatalogoptionlistadded
Adds an option list (modifier group) to a catalog
given: ⚡ CatalogCreated
when: 📩 AddOptionList
then: ⚡ OptionListAdded
verifies: 📐 CatalogOptionListManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogAddOptionListIsRejected🔗 #test-testcatalogaddoptionlistisrejected
Rejects adding an option list with no option or invalid selection bounds
given: (none)
when: 📩 AddOptionList
thrown: ⛔ CatalogNotFound, ⛔ OptionListMustHaveOption, ⛔ InvalidSelectionBounds
verifies: 📐 CatalogOptionListManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogOptionListUpdated🔗 #test-testcatalogoptionlistupdated
Updates an option list (full replace)
given: ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ OptionListAdded
when: 📩 UpdateOptionList
then: ⚡ OptionListUpdated
verifies: 📐 CatalogOptionListManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogUpdateOptionListIsRejected🔗 #test-testcatalogupdateoptionlistisrejected
Rejects updating a missing option list or leaving it with no option
given: (none)
when: 📩 UpdateOptionList
thrown: ⛔ OptionListNotFound, ⛔ OptionListMustHaveOption
verifies: 📐 CatalogOptionListManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogOptionListRemoved🔗 #test-testcatalogoptionlistremoved
Removes an option list from a catalog
given: ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ OptionListAdded
when: 📩 RemoveOptionList
then: ⚡ OptionListRemoved
verifies: 📐 CatalogOptionListManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogRemoveOptionListIsRejected🔗 #test-testcatalogremoveoptionlistisrejected
Rejects removing a missing option list or one still used by an offer
given: (none)
when: 📩 RemoveOptionList
thrown: ⛔ OptionListNotFound, ⛔ OptionListInUse
verifies: 📐 CatalogOptionListManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogOfferStockUpdated🔗 #test-testcatalogofferstockupdated
Sets the stock level of an offer
given: ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ ProductAdded
when: 📩 UpdateOfferStock
then: ⚡ OfferStockUpdated
verifies: 📐 OfferStockManualOrSynced
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogUpdateOfferStockIsRejected🔗 #test-testcatalogupdateofferstockisrejected
Rejects setting stock for a missing or non-stock-tracked offer
given: (none)
when: 📩 UpdateOfferStock
thrown: ⛔ OfferNotFound, ⛔ OfferNotStockTracked
verifies: 📐 OfferStockManualOrSynced
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogOfferStockSyncedFromHubRise🔗 #test-testcatalogofferstocksyncedfromhubrise
Records an inbound HubRise inventory sync (event reaction, no command)
given: ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ ProductAdded
when: 📩 OfferStockUpdated
then: ⚡ OfferStockUpdated
verifies: 📐 OfferStockManualOrSynced
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogImported🔗 #test-testcatalogimported
Imports a full catalog from an external source
given: ⚡ CatalogCreated
when: 📩 ImportCatalog
then: ⚡ CatalogImported
verifies: 📐 CatalogImportReplacesContent
▸Test: 🧪 TestCatalogImportIsRejected🔗 #test-testcatalogimportisrejected
Rejects importing into a missing catalog, on a translation failure, or with a missing ref
given: (none)
when: 📩 ImportCatalog
thrown: ⛔ CatalogNotFound, ⛔ CatalogTranslationFailed, ⛔ MissingRef
verifies: 📐 CatalogImportReplacesContent
🔲 3. order 🔗
Cart selection → checkout → order lifecycle, incl. the checkout & refund sagas (the V0 risk point: external Stripe).
🧰 API operations (21)
▸Query: 🔎 cart🔗 #query-cart
A single cart by id (session-scoped; readable by the guest/customer who owns it).
input: 🧩 CartQueryInput! { id: 🔤 CartId }
returns: 🧩 Cart · reads 🗄️ Cart
roles: EVERYONE (open — roles omitted) · V0
▸Query: 🔎 orders🔗 #query-orders
Orders, optionally scoped by customer and/or restaurant and filtered by status. Serves both the customer's own history and the restaurant back-office queue; ownership/scope enforced server-side.
input: 🧩 OrdersQueryInput { customerId?: 🔤 CustomerId, restaurantId?: 🔤 RestaurantId, status?: 🔤 OrderStatus }
returns: 🧩 Order [] · reads 🗄️ OrderTracking
roles: CUSTOMER, RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT, ADMIN · V0
▸Query: 🔎 order🔗 #query-order
Order tracking by id; owning customer or the restaurant/admin. Ownership enforced server-side.
input: 🧩 OrderQueryInput! { id: 🔤 OrderId }
returns: 🧩 Order · reads 🗄️ OrderTracking
roles: CUSTOMER, RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT, ADMIN · V0

command: 📩 AddCartLine → 🎭 Cart
roles: EVERYONE (open — roles omitted) · V0
returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)
▸Mutation: ✏️ removeCartLine🔗 #mutation-removecartline
command: 📩 RemoveCartLine → 🎭 Cart
roles: EVERYONE (open — roles omitted) · V0
returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)

roles: EVERYONE (open — roles omitted) · V0
returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)

command: 📩 PlaceOrder → 🎭 PlaceOrderProcess
