returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)
▸Mutation: ✏️ denyRefund🔗 #mutation-denyrefund
command: 📩 DenyRefund → 🎭 RefundProcess
roles: RESTAURANT, ADMIN · V0
returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)
▸Subscription: 🔔 orderStatusChanged🔗 #subscription-orderstatuschanged
Order status change events for ONE order, tracked by orderId — what the confirmation screen has in hand (#14, ADR-20260720-220000; replaces the pre-acceptance-first correlationId key). Ownership is resolver-side per row: a CUSTOMER caller must BE the order's customer; ADMIN sees any order; RESTAURANT/RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT paths are trusted like the `orders` query until a caller↔restaurant binding exists (recorded gap). No guest session scope on Order reads (ADR-20260720-213000 §3 — guests follow paymentStatusChanged until they verify a phone).
input: 🧩 OrderStatusChangedSubscriptionInput! { orderId: 🔤 OrderId }
streams: 🧩 Order
roles: CUSTOMER, RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT, ADMIN · V0
🧩 Output types (3)
▸Type: 🧩 Cart🔗 #type-cart
A customer's in-progress selection for a single restaurant (priced by the projection).
read model: 🗄️ Cart
FieldTypeReq.
id🔤 CartId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
customerId🔤 CustomerId⬜ nullable
status🔤 CartStatus✅ required
lines[📦 OrderLineItem]✅ required
totalAmount📦 Money✅ required
breakdown📦 PaymentBreakdown⬜ nullable
uberComparison📦 UberComparison⬜ nullable
updatedAtstring date-time✅ required
▸Type: 🧩 Order🔗 #type-order
An order with its tracking status and payment state.
read model: 🗄️ OrderTracking
FieldTypeReq.
id🔤 OrderId✅ required
ref🔤 ExternalReference✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
customerId🔤 CustomerId⬜ nullable
status🔤 OrderStatus✅ required
serviceType🔤 ServiceType✅ required
items[📦 OrderLineItem]✅ required
totalAmount📦 Money✅ required
breakdown📦 PaymentBreakdown✅ required
deliveryAddress📦 Address⬜ nullable
estimatedReadyAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
placedAtstring date-time✅ required
statusChangedAtstring date-time✅ required
paymentStatus🔤 PaymentStatus✅ required
restaurantStars🔤 StarRating⬜ nullable
ratingComment🔤 RatingComment⬜ nullable
riderThumb🔤 ThumbRating⬜ nullable
riderTip📦 Money⬜ nullable
restaurantTip📦 Money⬜ nullable
captainTip📦 Money⬜ nullable
uberComparison📦 UberComparison⬜ nullable
deliveryStatus🔤 DeliveryStatus⬜ nullable
courier📦 Courier⬜ nullable
estimatedDropoffAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
ratedAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
▸Type: 🧩 Refund🔗 #type-refund
A refund opened for decision on a paid order (RefundProcess): REQUESTED until the restaurant/admin decides, then APPROVED (Stripe refund requested) or DENIED, and REFUNDED once Stripe settles. Serves the restaurant's and admin's refund queue (filter status = REQUESTED for pending ones).
read model: 🗄️ View_PendingRefunds
FieldTypeReq.
orderId🔤 OrderId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
status🔤 RefundStatus✅ required
amount📦 Money✅ required
approvedAmount📦 Money⬜ nullable
reasonstring⬜ nullable
refundId🔤 RefundId⬜ nullable
requestedAtstring date-time✅ required
decidedAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
🎭 Actors (5)
▸Actor: 🎭 Cart🔗 #actor-cart
A visitor's in-progress selection for one restaurant, built (possibly as a guest) before checkout. Validated incrementally; converted to an Order by PlaceOrderProcess.
🧩 aggregate
ReceivesEmits →Throws
📩 AddCartLine⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded⛔ CartNotFound, ⛔ CartNotOpen, ⛔ CartRestaurantMismatch, ⛔ OfferNotFound, ⛔ OfferUnavailable, ⛔ InsufficientStock, ⛔ InvalidOptionSelection, ⛔ QuantityExceedsLimit
📩 RemoveCartLine⚡ CartLineRemoved⛔ CartNotFound, ⛔ CartNotOpen, ⛔ CartLineNotFound
📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity⚡ CartLineQuantityChanged⛔ CartNotFound, ⛔ CartNotOpen, ⛔ CartLineNotFound, ⛔ InsufficientStock, ⛔ QuantityExceedsLimit
📩 BindCartToCustomer⚡ CartBoundToCustomer⛔ CartNotFound
⚡ CartCheckedOut⚡ CartCheckedOut—
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> OPEN : CartStarted
  OPEN --> CHECKED_OUT : CartCheckedOut
  CHECKED_OUT --> [*]
▸Actor: 🎭 Order🔗 #actor-order
A single order through its lifecycle. Born from OrderPlaced (delivered by PlaceOrderProcess and recorded here), then driven to a terminal state.
🧩 aggregate
ReceivesEmits →Throws
⚡ OrderPlaced⚡ OrderPlaced—
📩 AcceptOrder⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
📩 StartPreparation⚡ OrderPreparationStarted⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
📩 MarkOrderReady⚡ OrderMarkedReady⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
📩 MarkOrderDelivered⚡ OrderDelivered⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
📩 RejectOrder⚡ OrderRejectedByRestaurant⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
📩 CancelOrderByCustomer⚡ OrderCancelledByCustomer⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
📩 CancelOrderByRestaurant⚡ OrderCancelledByRestaurant⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
📩 RateOrder⚡ OrderRated⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus, ⛔ OrderAlreadyRated
📩 RateRestaurant⚡ RestaurantRated⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus, ⛔ RestaurantAlreadyRated
📩 TipOrder⚡ OrderTipped⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus, ⛔ InvalidTipRecipient
📩 RequestRefund⚡ RefundRequested⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> PLACED : OrderPlaced
  PLACED --> ACCEPTED : OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
  ACCEPTED --> PREPARING : OrderPreparationStarted
  ACCEPTED --> READY : OrderMarkedReady
  PREPARING --> READY : OrderMarkedReady
  READY --> DELIVERED : OrderDelivered
  PLACED --> REJECTED : OrderRejectedByRestaurant
  PLACED --> CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER : OrderCancelledByCustomer
  ACCEPTED --> CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT : OrderCancelledByRestaurant
  PREPARING --> CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT : OrderCancelledByRestaurant
  READY --> CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT : OrderCancelledByRestaurant
  DELIVERED --> [*]
  REJECTED --> [*]
  CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER --> [*]
  CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT --> [*]
▸Actor: 🎭 Payment🔗 #actor-payment
A payment for an order, driven to a terminal state. Born from PaymentIntentCreated (emitted by PlaceOrderProcess), then driven to a terminal state.
🧩 aggregate
ReceivesEmits →Throws
⚡ PaymentIntentCreated⚡ PaymentIntentCreated—
⚡ PaymentCaptured⚡ PaymentCaptured—
⚡ PaymentFailed⚡ PaymentFailed—
⚡ PaymentRefunded⚡ PaymentRefunded—
⚡ RefundOpened⚡ RefundOpened—
⚡ RefundApproved⚡ RefundApproved—
⚡ RefundDenied⚡ RefundDenied—
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> PENDING : PaymentIntentCreated
  PENDING --> CAPTURED : PaymentCaptured
  PENDING --> FAILED : PaymentFailed
  CAPTURED --> REFUNDED : PaymentRefunded
  FAILED --> [*]
  REFUNDED --> [*]
▸Actor: 🎭 PlaceOrderProcess🔗 #actor-placeorderprocess
The checkout saga. On PlaceOrder: reads the OPEN cart, re-validates and prices it server-side against the live catalog, creates the Stripe PaymentIntent, and freezes the full priced checkout onto PaymentIntentCreated (ADR-20260719-014434) — the state row (one live run per cart) is what prevents concurrent checkouts of the same cart. On PaymentCaptured: materializes the Order and closes the cart from the frozen snapshot alone. On PaymentFailed: resolves the run; the cart stays OPEN.
⚙️ process manager
ReceivesEmits →Throws
📩 PlaceOrder⚡ PaymentIntentCreated⛔ CartNotFound, ⛔ CartNotOpen, ⛔ CartEmpty, ⛔ RestaurantPaused, ⛔ CannotOrderTestRestaurant, ⛔ DeliveryAddressRequired, ⛔ OutsideDeliveryArea, ⛔ PriceUnresolvable, ⛔ PriceMismatch, ⛔ PaymentDeclined
⚡ PaymentCaptured⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ CartCheckedOut⛔ PaymentEventOrphaned
⚡ PaymentFailedPayment failed: resolve the run; no order is placed and the cart stays OPEN.⛔ PaymentEventOrphaned
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant IN as Inbox (trigger)
  participant PM as PlaceOrderProcess (decides)
  participant ST as payment_process_manager (state)
  participant RM_Cart as Cart (read model)
  participant RM_Restaurant as Restaurant (read model)
  participant PT_payment as port payment (adapter)
  participant AG_Payment as Payment (aggregate)
  participant AG_Order as Order (aggregate)
  participant AG_Cart as Cart (aggregate)
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: PlaceOrder (command)
  PM->>RM_Cart: read as cart [cart_id=PlaceOrder.cartId]
  PM--xIN: throws CartNotFound
  PM--xIN: throws CartNotOpen unless cart.status == OPEN
  PM--xIN: throws CartEmpty
  PM->>RM_Restaurant: read as restaurant [restaurant_id=PlaceOrder.restaurantId]
  PM--xIN: throws RestaurantPaused
  PM--xIN: throws CannotOrderTestRestaurant
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryAddressRequired
  PM--xIN: throws OutsideDeliveryArea
  PM--xIN: throws PriceUnresolvable
  PM--xIN: throws PriceMismatch
  PM->>PT_payment: request
  PM--xIN: throws PaymentDeclined
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver PaymentIntentCreated — the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set cart_id=PlaceOrder.cartId, order_id=PlaceOrder.orderId, payment_intent_id=payment.request, process_status=AWAITING_PAYMENT_RESULT, payment_status=PENDING
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: PaymentCaptured (event)
  PM->>ST: by payment_intent_id=PaymentCaptured.paymentIntentId
  PM--xIN: throws PaymentEventOrphaned
  PM->>ST: expect process_status=AWAITING_PAYMENT_RESULT
  PM->>AG_Order: deliver OrderPlaced — the aggregate records it
  PM->>AG_Cart: deliver CartCheckedOut — the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set payment_status=CAPTURED, process_status=ORDER_PLACED, last_processed_stripe_event_id=envelope.event_id
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: PaymentFailed (event)
  PM->>ST: by payment_intent_id=PaymentFailed.paymentIntentId
  PM--xIN: throws PaymentEventOrphaned
  PM->>ST: expect process_status=AWAITING_PAYMENT_RESULT
  PM->>ST: set payment_status=FAILED, process_status=FAILED, last_processed_stripe_event_id=envelope.event_id
  end
▸Actor: 🎭 RefundProcess🔗 #actor-refundprocess
Approved refunds. A refundable fact (rejection, cancellation, customer request) OPENS a pending refund: RefundOpened is delivered to the Payment aggregate (so the refund queue, View_PendingRefunds, folds from the log) and the state row goes PENDING_APPROVAL; the RESTAURANT (its own orders) or an ADMIN decides with ApproveRefund / DenyRefund (authz = api.yaml roles); on approval the outbound Stripe refund is requested and the run settles when Stripe reports PaymentRefunded (the fact itself is recorded by the Payment aggregate). The refund-eligibility window is a config value enforced at approval, not a domain rule.
⚙️ process manager
ReceivesEmits →Throws
⚡ OrderRejectedByRestaurant⚡ RefundOpened—
⚡ OrderCancelledByCustomer⚡ RefundOpened—
⚡ OrderCancelledByRestaurant⚡ RefundOpened—
⚡ RefundRequested⚡ RefundOpened—
📩 ApproveRefund⚡ RefundApproved⛔ RefundNotPending
📩 DenyRefund⚡ RefundDenied⛔ RefundNotPending
⚡ PaymentRefundedStripe reported the settled refund (recorded by the Payment aggregate) — close the run. The fact is already in the log; nothing to emit. —
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant IN as Inbox (trigger)
  participant PM as RefundProcess (decides)
  participant ST as refund_process_manager (state)
  participant RM_OrderTracking as OrderTracking (read model)
  participant AG_Payment as Payment (aggregate)
  participant PT_payment as port payment (adapter)
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: OrderRejectedByRestaurant (event)
  PM->>RM_OrderTracking: read as order [order_id=OrderRejectedByRestaurant.orderId]
  Note over PM: skip unless order.payment_status == CAPTURED
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver RefundOpened — the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set order_id=OrderRejectedByRestaurant.orderId, payment_intent_id=order.payment_intent_id, process_status=PENDING_APPROVAL, reason=OrderRejectedByRestaurant.reason
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: OrderCancelledByCustomer (event)
  PM->>RM_OrderTracking: read as order [order_id=OrderCancelledByCustomer.orderId]
  Note over PM: skip unless order.payment_status == CAPTURED
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver RefundOpened — the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set order_id=OrderCancelledByCustomer.orderId, payment_intent_id=order.payment_intent_id, process_status=PENDING_APPROVAL, reason=OrderCancelledByCustomer.reason
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: OrderCancelledByRestaurant (event)
  PM->>RM_OrderTracking: read as order [order_id=OrderCancelledByRestaurant.orderId]
  Note over PM: skip unless order.payment_status == CAPTURED
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver RefundOpened — the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set order_id=OrderCancelledByRestaurant.orderId, payment_intent_id=order.payment_intent_id, process_status=PENDING_APPROVAL, reason=OrderCancelledByRestaurant.reason
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: RefundRequested (event)
  PM->>RM_OrderTracking: read as order [order_id=RefundRequested.orderId]
  Note over PM: skip unless order.payment_status == CAPTURED
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver RefundOpened — the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set order_id=RefundRequested.orderId, payment_intent_id=order.payment_intent_id, process_status=PENDING_APPROVAL, reason=RefundRequested.reason
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: ApproveRefund (command)
  PM->>ST: by order_id=ApproveRefund.orderId
  PM--xIN: throws RefundNotPending unless state.process_status == PENDING_APPROVAL
  PM->>PT_payment: refund
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver RefundApproved — the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set process_status=APPROVED_AWAITING_SETTLEMENT, approved_amount_cents=ApproveRefund.amount, reason=ApproveRefund.reason
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DenyRefund (command)
  PM->>ST: by order_id=DenyRefund.orderId
  PM--xIN: throws RefundNotPending unless state.process_status == PENDING_APPROVAL
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver RefundDenied — the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set process_status=DENIED, reason=DenyRefund.reason
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: PaymentRefunded (event)
  PM->>ST: by order_id=PaymentRefunded.orderId; expect process_status=APPROVED_AWAITING_SETTLEMENT
  PM->>ST: set refund_id=PaymentRefunded.refundId, process_status=REFUNDED
  end
🗄️ Views (3)
▸View: 🗄️ View_PendingRefunds🔗 #view-view_pendingrefunds
source: 🎭 Payment · 🛶 V0
fed by: ⚡ RefundOpened, ⚡ RefundApproved, ⚡ RefundDenied, ⚡ PaymentRefunded
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
order_id🔤 OrderId (derived) → 🗄️ OrderTracking⚡ RefundOpened.orderIdPK
restaurant_id🔤 RestaurantId (derived) → 🗄️ Restaurant⚡ RefundOpened.restaurantIdindex
status🔤 RefundStatus⚡ RefundOpened, ⚡ RefundApproved, ⚡ RefundDenied, ⚡ PaymentRefunded—Derived from the latest lifecycle event type.
amount_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ RefundOpened.amount—amountCents of RefundOpened.amount (Money) — the captured total eligible for refund.
currency🔤 CurrencyCode⚡ RefundOpened.amount—currency of RefundOpened.amount (Money).
approved_amount_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ RefundApproved.amountnullableamountCents of RefundApproved.amount (Money — may be partial); null until approved.
reasontext⚡ RefundOpened.reason, ⚡ RefundApproved.reason, ⚡ RefundDenied.reasonnullableThe latest recorded reason: the opening fact's, then the decision's.
refund_id🔤 RefundId⚡ PaymentRefunded.refundIdnullableThe Stripe Refund id once settled; null before PaymentRefunded.
requested_attimestamptz⚡ RefundOpened—RefundOpened occurrence time.
decided_attimestamptz⚡ RefundApproved, ⚡ RefundDeniednullableThe decision's occurrence time (approval or denial); null while REQUESTED.
created_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
updated_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
▸View: 🗄️ Cart🔗 #view-cart
source: 🎭 Cart · 🛶 V0
Joined with the catalog for pricing (secondary source).
fed by: ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded, ⚡ CartLineQuantityChanged, ⚡ CartLineRemoved, ⚡ CartCheckedOut, ⚡ CartBoundToCustomer
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
cart_id🔤 CartId (derived)⚡ CartStarted.cartIdPK
restaurant_id🔤 RestaurantId (derived) → 🗄️ Restaurant⚡ CartStarted.restaurantId—
session_id🔤 SessionId (derived)⚡ CartStarted.sessionIdindexThe visitor session that started the cart; CartBindingProcess binds all OPEN carts of a session on CustomerIdentified.
customer_id🔤 CustomerId (derived) → 🗄️ Customer⚡ CartStarted.customerId, ⚡ CartBoundToCustomer.customerIdnullableNULL while guest; bound by CartBoundToCustomer (CartBindingProcess sends BindCartToCustomer per open cart of the identified session) or at checkout.
status🔤 CartStatus⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartCheckedOut—Derived from event type: OPEN on CartStarted, CHECKED_OUT on CartCheckedOut.
linesjsonb⚡ CartLineAdded, ⚡ CartLineQuantityChanged, ⚡ CartLineRemoved—Priced by the projection from the live catalog: [{ cart_line_id, offer_id, product_id, name, offer_name, quantity, unit_price_cents, selected_options, line_total_cents }].
total_amount_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ CartLineAdded, ⚡ CartLineQuantityChanged, ⚡ CartLineRemoved—COMPUTED by the projection from the live catalog (never trusted from the client).
currency🔤 CurrencyCode⚡ CartLineAdded—From the catalog currency at pricing time (the restaurant's default_currency).
estimated_breakdownjsonb⚡ CartLineAdded, ⚡ CartLineQuantityChanged, ⚡ CartLineRemovednullableESTIMATED PaymentBreakdown for the checkout display (ADR-0018), COMPUTED by the projection from the cart food total + PricingPolicy + the restaurant margin_rate. Same shape as OrderPlaced.breakdown; recomputed on the final order.
uber_comparisonjsonb⚡ CartLineAdded, ⚡ CartLineQuantityChanged, ⚡ CartLineRemovednullableUberComparison for the cart-level comparison (ADR-0022/0025), COMPUTED by the projection (see rules). Null when the restaurant has no cuisine_category.
created_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
updated_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
▸View: 🗄️ OrderTracking🔗 #view-ordertracking
source: 🎭 Order · 🛶 V0
The single canonical Order read model. Folds the Order lifecycle + Stripe payment facts (secondary source). Serves every order query — by id (`order`), by customer (history) and by restaurant+status (back-office queue) — via the indexes below; there is no separate per-persona order projection.
fed by: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant, ⚡ OrderPreparationStarted, ⚡ OrderMarkedReady, ⚡ OrderDelivered, ⚡ OrderRejectedByRestaurant, ⚡ OrderCancelledByCustomer, ⚡ OrderCancelledByRestaurant, ⚡ PaymentCaptured, ⚡ PaymentRefunded, ⚡ OrderRated, ⚡ RestaurantRated, ⚡ OrderTipped, ⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner, ⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByRider, ⚡ DeliveryStatusUpdated, ⚡ DeliveryCompleted, ⚡ DeliveryDispatchFailed
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
order_id🔤 OrderId (derived)⚡ OrderPlaced.orderIdPK
ref🔤 ExternalReference (derived)⚡ OrderPlaced.ref—
restaurant_id🔤 RestaurantId (derived) → 🗄️ Restaurant⚡ OrderPlaced.restaurantId—
customer_id🔤 CustomerId (derived) → 🗄️ Customer⚡ OrderPlaced.customerIdindex, nullable
status🔤 OrderStatus⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant, ⚡ OrderPreparationStarted, ⚡ OrderMarkedReady, ⚡ OrderDelivered, ⚡ OrderRejectedByRestaurant, ⚡ OrderCancelledByCustomer, ⚡ OrderCancelledByRestaurant—Derived from the lifecycle event type.
service_type🔤 ServiceType (derived)⚡ OrderPlaced.serviceType—
itemsjsonb (derived)⚡ OrderPlaced.items—
total_amount_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderPlaced.totalAmount—amountCents of OrderPlaced.totalAmount (Money).
currency🔤 CurrencyCode⚡ OrderPlaced.totalAmount—currency of OrderPlaced.totalAmount (Money).
articles_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderPlaced.breakdown—breakdown.articles.amountCents (food TTC; ADR-0016/0018).
delivery_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderPlaced.breakdown—breakdown.delivery.amountCents (→ rider; 0 for collection).
service_fee_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderPlaced.breakdown—breakdown.serviceFee.amountCents (Captain buyer service fee).
restaurant_payout_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderPlaced.breakdown—breakdown.restaurantPayout.amountCents (3-way split → restaurant).
rider_payout_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderPlaced.breakdown—breakdown.riderPayout.amountCents (3-way split → rider).
captain_net_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderPlaced.breakdown—breakdown.captainNet.amountCents (kept by Captain; feeds Open-Collective totals).
uber_total_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderPlaced.breakdownnullableDERIVED estimated Uber Eats all-in total for the same order (ADR-0025; see rules). Null if no cuisine_category.
uber_restaurant_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderPlaced.breakdownnullableDERIVED estimated Uber restaurant net (after ~30% commission; see rules).
uber_rider_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderPlaced.breakdownnullableDERIVED estimated Uber courier earning (base; per-km not modelled in V0; see rules).
uber_platform_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderPlaced.breakdownnullableDERIVED estimated Uber platform take = uber_total − uber_restaurant − uber_rider.
uber_basis🔤 ComparisonBasis⚡ OrderPlaced.breakdownnullableESTIMATED (V0) or REAL (opted-in + HubRise Uber prices; deferred). Null if no comparison.
delivery_addressjsonb (derived)⚡ OrderPlaced.deliveryAddressnullable
estimated_ready_attimestamptz (derived)⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant.estimatedReadyAtnullable
placed_attimestamptz⚡ OrderPlaced—OrderPlaced occurrence time.
status_changed_attimestamptz⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant, ⚡ OrderPreparationStarted, ⚡ OrderMarkedReady, ⚡ OrderDelivered, ⚡ OrderRejectedByRestaurant, ⚡ OrderCancelledByCustomer, ⚡ OrderCancelledByRestaurant—Occurrence time of the latest status-changing event.
payment_intent_id🔤 PaymentIntentId (derived)⚡ PaymentCaptured.paymentIntentIdnullableThe captured Stripe PaymentIntent; RefundProcess reads it to open a pending refund.
payment_statustext⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ PaymentCaptured, ⚡ PaymentRefunded—Folded from Stripe facts; candidate for a PaymentStatus enum. OrderPlaced seeds CAPTURED: PlaceOrderProcess emits it only in reaction to PaymentCaptured (V0 prepaid-online), and that capture sits earlier in the log than the row it would fold into.
restaurant_stars🔤 StarRating (derived)⚡ RestaurantRated.starsnullableCustomer's 0–5 rating of the restaurant; null until rated.
rating_comment🔤 RatingComment (derived)⚡ RestaurantRated.commentnullable
rider_thumb🔤 ThumbRating (derived)⚡ OrderRated.riderThumbnullable
rider_tip_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderTipped.tipsnullableΣ OrderTipped.tips[recipient==RIDER].amount (all tippers); null if none.
restaurant_tip_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderTipped.tipsnullableΣ OrderTipped.tips[recipient==RESTAURANT].amount; null if none.
captain_tip_cents🔤 MoneyCents⚡ OrderTipped.tipsnullableΣ OrderTipped.tips[recipient==CAPTAIN].amount; null if none.
rated_attimestamptz⚡ OrderRated, ⚡ RestaurantRated, ⚡ OrderTippednullableOccurrence time of the latest rating/tip event.
delivery_status🔤 DeliveryStatus⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner, ⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByRider, ⚡ DeliveryStatusUpdated, ⚡ DeliveryCompleted, ⚡ DeliveryDispatchFailednullableMirror of the order's DeliveryJob status (correlated by order_id); null for COLLECTION / before dispatch. DeliveryDispatchFailed (offer cap exhausted) mirrors FAILED (ADR-20260720-004556).
courierjsonb⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner, ⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByRidernullableAssigned Courier { displayName, phone?, riderId? } once accepted; null before.
estimated_dropoff_attimestamptz⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner.estimatedDropoffAtnullablePartner-reported ETA to the customer; null when unknown.
created_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
updated_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
📩 Commands (18)
▸Command: 📩 AddCartLine🔗 #command-addcartline
Visitor adds a line to a cart, validated against the live catalog. The client generates the cartId and sends it on every add; the first add for a new cartId creates the cart (idempotently), binding it to the restaurant.
dispatched by: ✏️ addCartLine · handled by 🎭 Cart
emits: ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
throws: ⛔ CartNotFound, ⛔ CartNotOpen, ⛔ CartRestaurantMismatch, ⛔ OfferNotFound, ⛔ OfferUnavailable, ⛔ InsufficientStock, ⛔ InvalidOptionSelection, ⛔ QuantityExceedsLimit
FieldTypeReq.Description
cartId🔤 CartId✅ requiredClient-generated cart id; the first add for it creates the cart (session-owned).
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
line📦 CartLine✅ required
sessionId🔤 SessionId✅ requiredOptional session id (ADR-0038) to bind the cart to a session for test-mode carts.
▸Command: 📩 RemoveCartLine🔗 #command-removecartline
Visitor removes a line from a cart.
dispatched by: ✏️ removeCartLine · handled by 🎭 Cart
emits: ⚡ CartLineRemoved
throws: ⛔ CartNotFound, ⛔ CartNotOpen, ⛔ CartLineNotFound
FieldTypeReq.Description
cartId🔤 CartId✅ required
cartLineId🔤 CartLineId✅ required
sessionId🔤 SessionId✅ requiredOptional session id (ADR-0038) to bind the cart to a session for test-mode carts.
▸Command: 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity🔗 #command-changecartlinequantity
Visitor changes the quantity of an existing cart line.
dispatched by: ✏️ changeCartLineQuantity · handled by 🎭 Cart
emits: ⚡ CartLineQuantityChanged
throws: ⛔ CartNotFound, ⛔ CartNotOpen, ⛔ CartLineNotFound, ⛔ InsufficientStock, ⛔ QuantityExceedsLimit
FieldTypeReq.Description
cartId🔤 CartId✅ required
cartLineId🔤 CartLineId✅ required
quantityinteger✅ required
sessionId🔤 SessionId✅ requiredOptional session id (ADR-0038) to bind the cart to a session for test-mode carts.
▸Command: 📩 PlaceOrder🔗 #command-placeorder
SAGA (checkout). Reads the OPEN cart referenced by cartId, re-validates it against the live catalog, prices it server-side, takes payment via Stripe, records the order, then closes the cart. This is the V0 risk point: it depends on an external actor (Stripe) and must be a saga with a failure branch. Now that the customer has verified their phone, customerId is bound here.
dispatched by: ✏️ placeOrder · handled by 🎭 PlaceOrderProcess
emits: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated
throws: ⛔ CartNotFound, ⛔ CartNotOpen, ⛔ CartEmpty, ⛔ RestaurantPaused, ⛔ CannotOrderTestRestaurant, ⛔ DeliveryAddressRequired, ⛔ OutsideDeliveryArea, ⛔ PriceUnresolvable, ⛔ PriceMismatch, ⛔ PaymentDeclined
FieldTypeReq.Description
mode🔤 Mode⬜ optional
orderId🔤 OrderId✅ requiredClient-generated id for the order the saga will materialize on payment capture.
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
cartId🔤 CartId✅ requiredThe OPEN cart to check out; its lines become the order's line items.
customerId🔤 CustomerId⬜ nullableResolved from the now-authenticated session; bound onto the cart at checkout.
customerContact📦 CustomerContact✅ required
serviceType🔤 ServiceType✅ required
deliveryAddress📦 Address⬜ nullable
note🔤 OrderNote⬜ nullable
paymentMethodIdstring✅ requiredStripe PaymentMethod / client secret reference for the payment step. The wallet behind it (card, Apple Pay, Google Pay) is a client-side/Stripe concern and does not change the domain: every method yields a standard Stripe PaymentMethod and the same saga.
expectedTotal📦 Money⬜ nullableOPTIONAL confirmation of the total the client displayed at checkout. NEVER used to price anything — the server recomputes the total from the live catalog (the only price authority) and rejects with errors.yaml#/PriceMismatch when the two diverge, so a customer is never charged an amount other than the one they were shown.
▸Command: 📩 AcceptOrder🔗 #command-acceptorder
Restaurant accepts an order and commits to preparing it.
dispatched by: ✏️ acceptOrder · handled by 🎭 Order
emits: ⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
throws: ⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
FieldTypeReq.Description
orderId🔤 OrderId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
estimatedReadyAtstring date-time⬜ nullable

emits: ⚡ OrderRejectedByRestaurant
throws: ⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
FieldTypeReq.Description
orderId🔤 OrderId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
reasonstring✅ required

▸Command: 📩 CancelOrderByCustomer🔗 #command-cancelorderbycustomer
Customer cancels their order before the restaurant has accepted it; payment is refunded.
dispatched by: ✏️ cancelOrderByCustomer · handled by 🎭 Order

throws: ⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus

▸Event: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated🔗 #event-paymentintentcreated
A payment intent was created at checkout for a pending order. Carries the full priced checkout frozen at intent creation (`checkout`), so PlaceOrderProcess can rebuild OrderPlaced + CartCheckedOut from the event log alone when PaymentCaptured arrives (no out-of-log store). `checkout.restaurantId`/`customerId` duplicate the top-level fields and `checkout.totalAmount == amount == checkout.breakdown.total`.
emitted by: 🎭 Payment, 🎭 PlaceOrderProcess
consumed by: 🎭 Payment
projected into: non-projected
FieldTypeReq.Description
paymentIntentId🔤 PaymentIntentId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
customerId🔤 CustomerId⬜ nullable
amount📦 Money✅ required
checkout📦 CheckoutSnapshot✅ requiredThe full priced checkout frozen at intent creation (rebuilds OrderPlaced/CartCheckedOut on capture).

▸Event: ⚡ RefundOpened🔗 #event-refundopened
A refundable fact on a paid order (rejection, cancellation, customer request) opened a refund for a restaurant/admin decision. Delivered by RefundProcess to the Payment aggregate ONLY when the payment is CAPTURED, so the refund queue (View_PendingRefunds) folds from the log, not from PM state. `amount` is the captured order total eligible for refund (an approval may still be partial).
emitted by: 🎭 Payment, 🎭 RefundProcess
consumed by: 🎭 Payment
projected into: 🗄️ View_PendingRefunds
FieldTypeReq.Description
orderId🔤 OrderId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
amount📦 Money✅ requiredThe captured order total eligible for refund (the decision may approve less).
reasonstring⬜ nullable

📦 Entities (11)
▸Entity: 📦 Money🔗 #entity-money
Stronger-typed money than HubRise's "9.80 EUR" string. Converted at the HubRise boundary (parse + x100), kept as integer minor units + currency internally.
FieldTypeReq.Description
amountCents🔤 MoneyCents✅ required
currency🔤 CurrencyCode✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 PaymentBreakdown🔗 #entity-paymentbreakdown
The order's money breakdown, computed server-side by PlaceOrderProcess (ADR-0016/0017/0018). Carries BOTH the buyer-facing checkout lines and the 3-way Stripe Connect split, in one place so they can't diverge. Invariants: total = articles + delivery + serviceFee; restaurantPayout = articles − restaurantContribution; riderPayout = delivery; captainNet = serviceFee + restaurantContribution (gross of Stripe fees, which Captain absorbs as merchant of record). 0% commission on food: restaurantContribution is a distinct service line, never a cut of the menu price.
FieldTypeReq.Description
articles📦 Money✅ requiredFood sub-total TTC (100% to the restaurant, minus its service contribution).
delivery📦 Money✅ requiredDelivery fee (→ rider); zero for collection. Delivery integration is post-V0.
serviceFee📦 Money✅ requiredCaptain service fee shown to the buyer (the buyer part of the fee).
total📦 Money✅ requiredWhat the buyer pays = articles + delivery + serviceFee (the PaymentIntent amount).
restaurantContribution📦 Money✅ requiredRestaurant's variable service part (margin-proportional); deducted from its payout.
restaurantPayout📦 Money✅ requiredTransfer to the restaurant Connect account = articles − restaurantContribution.
riderPayout📦 Money✅ requiredTransfer to the rider Connect account = delivery.
captainNet📦 Money✅ requiredKept on the Captain platform account = serviceFee + restaurantContribution (gross of Stripe).
▸Entity: 📦 UberComparison🔗 #entity-ubercomparison
What the same order would cost — and how it would be split — on Uber Eats, for the pedagogical comparison (ADR-0022/0025). `basis` says whether these are the restaurant's REAL Uber prices (shared via HubRise opt-in, ADR-0023) or a labelled ESTIMATE (coefficient-based, ADR-0024). Estimated split: restaurantShare = uberFood × (1 − uber_commission); riderShare ≈ rider_base (+/km, not modelled in V0); platformShare = total − restaurantShare − riderShare. The client derives "you save" = captainTotal − total.
FieldTypeReq.Description
total📦 Money✅ requiredEstimated (or real) all-in Uber Eats price for the same order.
restaurantShare📦 Money✅ requiredWhat the restaurant would net on Uber (after its ~30% commission).
riderShare📦 Money✅ requiredWhat the courier would earn on Uber (base + per-km; per-km not modelled in V0).
platformShare📦 Money✅ requiredWhat Uber Eats would keep = total − restaurantShare − riderShare.
basis🔤 ComparisonBasis✅ requiredREAL (HubRise opt-in) or ESTIMATED (labelled). V0 shows ESTIMATED.
▸Entity: 📦 Tip🔗 #entity-tip
One customer tip to a single recipient (ADR-012). Optional, separate from the price; Captain keeps 0%.
FieldTypeReq.Description
recipient🔤 TipRecipient✅ required
amount📦 Money✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 CustomerContact🔗 #entity-customercontact
FieldTypeReq.Description
displayName🔤 CustomerDisplayName✅ required
email🔤 EmailAddress⬜ optional
phone🔤 PhoneNumber✅ required

quantityinteger✅ required
selectedOptionIds[🔤 OptionId]⬜ optional

A customer's in-progress selection for a SINGLE restaurant. customerId is null while the visitor is still a guest; it is bound at checkout once the phone is verified.
FieldTypeReq.Description
id🔤 CartId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
customerId🔤 CustomerId⬜ nullable
status🔤 CartStatus✅ required
lines[📦 CartLineItem]✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 SelectedOption🔗 #entity-selectedoption
An option chosen by the customer on a line item, priced at order time.
FieldTypeReq.Description
optionId🔤 OptionId✅ required
optionListId🔤 OptionListId⬜ optional
name🔤 OptionName✅ required
price📦 Money✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 OrderLineItem🔗 #entity-orderlineitem
FieldTypeReq.Description
offerId🔤 OfferId✅ required
productId🔤 ProductId⬜ optional
name🔤 ProductName✅ required
offerName🔤 OfferName⬜ nullable
quantityinteger✅ required
unitPrice📦 Money✅ required
selectedOptions[📦 SelectedOption]⬜ optional
lineTotal📦 Money✅ required(unitPrice + sum(selectedOptions.price)) * quantity, computed server-side.
▸Entity: 📦 CheckoutSnapshot🔗 #entity-checkoutsnapshot
The validated, server-priced checkout PlaceOrderProcess freezes onto events.yaml#/PaymentIntentCreated when it creates the Stripe PaymentIntent — everything events.yaml#/OrderPlaced + events.yaml#/CartCheckedOut need beyond the inbound PaymentCaptured fact, so the order is reconstructable from the event log alone (no out-of-log store). Mirrors the application `CheckoutSnapshot` port type. Invariant: totalAmount == breakdown.total (== the PaymentIntent amount).
FieldTypeReq.Description
orderId🔤 OrderId✅ required
cartId🔤 CartId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
customerId🔤 CustomerId⬜ nullable
mode🔤 Mode⬜ nullable
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
customerContact📦 CustomerContact✅ required
serviceType🔤 ServiceType✅ required
deliveryAddress📦 Address⬜ nullable
items[📦 OrderLineItem]✅ requiredPriced order lines frozen at checkout — recomputed server-side from the live catalog (rules.yaml#/ServerPriceAuthority).
totalAmount📦 Money✅ required
breakdown📦 PaymentBreakdown✅ required
note🔤 OrderNote⬜ nullable
▸Entity: 📦 Order🔗 #entity-order
FieldTypeReq.Description
mode🔤 Mode⬜ optional
id🔤 OrderId✅ required
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
customerId🔤 CustomerId⬜ nullable
customerContact📦 CustomerContact✅ required
serviceType🔤 ServiceType✅ required
deliveryAddress📦 Address⬜ nullable
items[📦 OrderLineItem]✅ required
totalAmount📦 Money✅ required
status🔤 OrderStatus✅ required
note🔤 OrderNote⬜ nullable
🔤 Scalars (17)
ScalarTypeDescription
🔤 OptionIdstring uuid
🔤 CartIdstring uuid
🔤 CartLineIdstring uuidIdentifies a line within a cart, used to edit its quantity or remove it.
🔤 PaymentIntentIdstringStripe PaymentIntent id (provider reference). Example: 'pi_3Nabc...'.
🔤 RefundIdstringStripe Refund id (provider reference). Example: 're_3Nabc...'.
🔤 MoneyCentsintegerMonetary amount in minor units (e.g. cents).
🔤 OrderNotestring
🔤 StarRatingintegerRestaurant rating in stars (0–5), given by the customer on a delivered order.
🔤 ThumbRatingenum (UP | DOWN)Rider rating: thumbs up or down.
🔤 RatingCommentstringFree-text comment accompanying a restaurant rating.
🔤 OrderStatusenum (PLACED | ACCEPTED | REJECTED | PREPARING | READY | OUT_FOR_DELIVERY | DELIVERED | CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER | CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT)
🔤 TipRecipientenum (RIDER | RESTAURANT | CAPTAIN)Who a tip goes to (ADR-012). Tips are separate from the core 3-way split and Captain skims 0% (100% passes through); a tip to CAPTAIN is the tipper's explicit choice, not a cut of others' tips.
🔤 Tipperenum (CUSTOMER | RESTAURANT)Who gives a tip: the CUSTOMER (may tip rider/restaurant/Captain) or the RESTAURANT (may tip rider/ Captain — e.g. thanking the courier). Derived server-side from the caller's role, not client-supplied.
🔤 CartStatusenum (OPEN | CHECKED_OUT)Lifecycle of a cart. Only an OPEN cart accepts line edits or checkout. Carts are never abandoned/expired — they persist until checked out, so there is no abandonment state.
🔤 PaymentStatusenum (PENDING | CAPTURED | FAILED | REFUNDED)Order payment state, folded from Stripe facts (PaymentIntentCreated/Captured/Failed/Refunded).
🔤 RefundStatusenum (REQUESTED | APPROVED | DENIED | REFUNDED)Lifecycle of a refund request as read models fold it from the domain facts (View_PendingRefunds): REQUESTED on RefundOpened (awaiting a restaurant/admin decision), APPROVED on RefundApproved (Stripe refund requested), DENIED on RefundDenied, REFUNDED once Stripe settles (PaymentRefunded). Distinct from RefundProcessStatus, the RefundProcess state-table run status.
🔤 ComparisonBasisenum (ESTIMATED | REAL)Provenance of an Uber Eats comparison amount: REAL (the restaurant's own Uber prices, shared via HubRise after explicit opt-in — ADR-0023) or ESTIMATED (coefficient-based, always labelled — ADR-0024).
⛔ Errors (22)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
⛔ RestaurantPausedRestaurant acceptance mode is PAUSED; it cannot take orders.🇬🇧 '{restaurantName}' is not taking orders right now.🇫🇷 '{restaurantName}' ne prend pas de commandes pour le moment.📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ OfferUnavailableOffer availability is UNAVAILABLE (manual flag).🇬🇧 '{productName}' ({offerName}) is currently unavailable.🇫🇷 '{productName}' ({offerName}) est actuellement indisponible.📩 AddCartLine
⛔ InsufficientStockRequested quantity exceeds available stock.🇬🇧 Only {available} left of '{productName}' ({offerName}), but {requested} were requested.🇫🇷 Il ne reste que {available} de '{productName}' ({offerName}), mais {requested} ont été demandés.📩 AddCartLine, 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity
⛔ QuantityExceedsLimitRequested quantity exceeds the per-line maximum.🇬🇧 You can't order that many of '{productName}'.🇫🇷 Vous ne pouvez pas commander autant de '{productName}'.📩 AddCartLine, 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity
⛔ InvalidOptionSelectionA selected option does not belong to the offer, or violates the option list's min/max.🇬🇧 Invalid option selection for '{productName}'.🇫🇷 Sélection d'options invalide pour '{productName}'.📩 AddCartLine
⛔ CartNotFoundNo cart with this id.🇬🇧 Cart not found.🇫🇷 Panier introuvable.📩 AddCartLine, 📩 RemoveCartLine, 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity, 📩 BindCartToCustomer, 📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ CartNotOpenCart is not OPEN (already checked out).🇬🇧 This cart can no longer be modified.🇫🇷 Ce panier ne peut plus être modifié.📩 AddCartLine, 📩 RemoveCartLine, 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity, 📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ CartRestaurantMismatchLine/checkout restaurant differs from the cart's restaurant (no mixing).🇬🇧 Your cart already has items from another restaurant, not '{restaurantName}'.🇫🇷 Votre panier contient déjà des articles d'un autre restaurant que '{restaurantName}'.📩 AddCartLine
⛔ CartLineNotFoundNo line with this id in the cart.🇬🇧 This cart line no longer exists.🇫🇷 Cette ligne du panier n'existe plus.📩 RemoveCartLine, 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity
⛔ CartEmptyCheckout attempted on an empty cart.🇬🇧 Your cart is empty.🇫🇷 Votre panier est vide.📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ OrderNotFoundNo order with this id.🇬🇧 Order not found.🇫🇷 Commande introuvable.📩 AcceptOrder, 📩 StartPreparation, 📩 MarkOrderReady, 📩 MarkOrderDelivered, 📩 RejectOrder, 📩 CancelOrderByCustomer, 📩 CancelOrderByRestaurant, 📩 RateOrder, 📩 RateRestaurant, 📩 TipOrder, 📩 RequestRefund
⛔ InvalidOrderStatusOrder is not in a status that allows this transition.🇬🇧 This action is not allowed while the order is '{currentStatus}'.🇫🇷 Cette action n'est pas autorisée tant que la commande est '{currentStatus}'.📩 AcceptOrder, 📩 StartPreparation, 📩 MarkOrderReady, 📩 MarkOrderDelivered, 📩 RejectOrder, 📩 CancelOrderByCustomer, 📩 CancelOrderByRestaurant, 📩 RateOrder, 📩 RateRestaurant, 📩 TipOrder, 📩 RequestRefund
⛔ OrderAlreadyRatedThe delivery (rider thumb) has already been rated for this order; final.🇬🇧 You have already rated this delivery.🇫🇷 Vous avez déjà noté cette livraison.📩 RateOrder
⛔ RestaurantAlreadyRatedThe restaurant has already been rated for this order; final (one per order).🇬🇧 You have already rated the restaurant for this order.🇫🇷 Vous avez déjà noté le restaurant pour cette commande.📩 RateRestaurant
⛔ InvalidTipRecipientThe tipper cannot tip this recipient (e.g. a restaurant tipping itself).🇬🇧 You can't send a tip to this recipient.🇫🇷 Vous ne pouvez pas envoyer de pourboire à ce destinataire.📩 TipOrder
⛔ DeliveryAddressRequiredserviceType is DELIVERY but no delivery address was provided.🇬🇧 A delivery address is required for delivery.🇫🇷 Une adresse de livraison est requise pour la livraison.📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ OutsideDeliveryAreaDelivery address is outside the restaurant's delivery area.🇬🇧 This address is outside the delivery area of '{restaurantName}'.🇫🇷 Cette adresse est en dehors de la zone de livraison de '{restaurantName}'.📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ PaymentDeclinedStripe declined the payment synchronously at checkout (no order placed).🇬🇧 Payment was declined.🇫🇷 Le paiement a été refusé.📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ PriceMismatchThe client-submitted confirmation total (PlaceOrder.expectedTotal) differs from the total the server recomputed from the live catalog. The server is the only price authority: the checkout is rejected so the customer is never charged an amount other than the one they were shown. 🇬🇧 Prices have changed since you loaded the menu. Please review your cart and try again.🇫🇷 Les prix ont changé depuis l'affichage du menu. Veuillez vérifier votre panier et réessayer.📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ PriceUnresolvableA cart line's price could not be resolved from the live catalog at checkout (offer or selected option no longer present). Fail-closed: the checkout is rejected — the server never falls back to a client-supplied amount. 🇬🇧 An item in your cart is no longer available at a known price. Please review your cart.🇫🇷 Un article de votre panier n'a plus de prix connu. Veuillez vérifier votre panier.📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ RefundNotPendingThe refund decision (ApproveRefund / DenyRefund, by the restaurant or an admin) targets an order with no refund pending approval — either no refund run exists for the order, or it was already approved, denied or settled. 🇬🇧 No refund is pending approval for this order.🇫🇷 Aucun remboursement n'est en attente d'approbation pour cette commande.📩 ApproveRefund, 📩 DenyRefund
⛔ CannotOrderTestRestaurantA production (LIVE) order was placed against a TEST restaurant (ADR-0038 test-mode isolation). Real customers never reach test data; a TEST order may instead target a LIVE restaurant (receipt validation). 🇬🇧 This restaurant is not available.🇫🇷 Ce restaurant n'est pas disponible.📩 PlaceOrder
📐 Business rules (19)
▸Rule: 📐 CartPricedFromLiveCatalog🔗 #rule-cartpricedfromlivecatalog
Cart lines are added/changed/removed and priced by the projection from the live catalog, never trusted from the client.
verified by: 🧪 TestCartFirstLineAdded, 🧪 TestCartLineQuantityChanged, 🧪 TestCartLineRemoved
▸Rule: 📐 CartRejectsUnorderableOrInvalidLine🔗 #rule-cartrejectsunorderableorinvalidline
Adding an unorderable offer or operating on an invalid/absent line is rejected.
verified by: 🧪 TestCartAddLineIsRejectedWhenOfferNotOrderable, 🧪 TestCartAddLineIsRejectedWhenCartInvalid, 🧪 TestCartRemoveLineIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 OrderLifecycleStatusMachine🔗 #rule-orderlifecyclestatusmachine
An order advances accept → prepare → ready → delivered (or reject/cancel), each transition allowed only from the correct status.
verified by: 🧪 TestOrderAcceptedByRestaurant, 🧪 TestOrderAcceptIsRejected, 🧪 TestOrderPreparationStarted, 🧪 TestOrderMarkedReady, 🧪 TestOrderDelivered, 🧪 TestOrderRejected, 🧪 TestOrderCancelledByCustomer, 🧪 TestOrderCancelledByRestaurant, 🧪 TestOrderLifecycleRejectsSkippedTransition, 🧪 TestOrderLifecycleTerminalStateRefusesTransitions
▸Rule: 📐 OrderLifecycleIsExplicit🔗 #rule-orderlifecycleisexplicit
The Order status machine is the DECLARED lifecycle (actors.yaml#/Order/lifecycle, ADR-20260720-004419), not implicit code: a move the declared transition table does not contain — a skipped/repeated step, or any transition out of a terminal state (DELIVERED, REJECTED, CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER, CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT) — is rejected with InvalidOrderStatus.
verified by: 🧪 TestOrderLifecycleRejectsSkippedTransition, 🧪 TestOrderLifecycleTerminalStateRefusesTransitions
▸Rule: 📐 OrderRatedOnceWhenDelivered🔗 #rule-orderratedoncewhendelivered
A delivered order can be rated (rider thumb) exactly once.
verified by: 🧪 TestOrderRated, 🧪 TestOrderRateOrderIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 RestaurantRatedOncePerOrder🔗 #rule-restaurantratedonceperorder
The restaurant can be rated exactly once per order.
verified by: 🧪 TestOrderRestaurantRated, 🧪 TestOrderRateRestaurantTwiceIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 TipsAdditiveMultiRecipientSeparate🔗 #rule-tipsadditivemultirecipientseparate
Tips (rider/restaurant/Captain, by customer or restaurant) are additive and separate from the split; an invalid recipient is rejected (ADR-0029).
verified by: 🧪 TestOrderTipped, 🧪 TestOrderTippedByRestaurant, 🧪 TestOrderTipIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 RefundRequestByCustomer🔗 #rule-refundrequestbycustomer
A customer can request a refund for an order.
verified by: 🧪 TestOrderRefundRequested
▸Rule: 📐 ServerPriceAuthority🔗 #rule-serverpriceauthority
The server is the only price authority on the write path: order line totals, the order total and the payment-intent amount are recomputed at checkout from the live catalog (Offer prices, Option prices) — no client-supplied amount is ever trusted. A client-submitted expectedTotal is a confirmation only, checked for equality (divergence rejects with PriceMismatch), and a cart line whose price cannot be resolved from the live catalog rejects the checkout fail-closed (PriceUnresolvable) — never a fallback to the client's number.
verified by: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderRecomputesPriceServerSide, 🧪 TestPlaceOrderRejectsPriceMismatch, 🧪 TestPlaceOrderRejectsUnresolvablePrice
▸Rule: 📐 CheckoutPricesCartCreatesPaymentIntent🔗 #rule-checkoutpricescartcreatespaymentintent
Checkout reads and prices the open cart and creates a Stripe PaymentIntent; it is rejected on paused restaurant / empty cart / missing or out-of-area address / declined payment.
verified by: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderCreatesPaymentIntent, 🧪 TestPlaceOrderIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 CheckoutSnapshotFrozenAtIntent🔗 #rule-checkoutsnapshotfrozenatintent
When it creates the PaymentIntent, PlaceOrderProcess freezes the full priced checkout (cart, contact, service type, delivery address, priced items, breakdown) onto PaymentIntentCreated, so the order can be materialized from the event log alone on payment capture — no out-of-log store.
verified by: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderCreatesPaymentIntent, 🧪 TestPaymentIntentCreatedRecorded
▸Rule: 📐 OrderTestModeIsolation🔗 #rule-ordertestmodeisolation
Test-mode isolation (ADR-0038): a production (LIVE) order is rejected against a TEST restaurant, so real customers never reach test data; a TEST order MAY target a LIVE restaurant to validate the real receipt path, and TEST orders/deliveries are excluded from payouts and analytics.
verified by: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderRejectsTestRestaurantForLiveOrder
▸Rule: 📐 OrderMaterializedOnPaymentCapture🔗 #rule-ordermaterializedonpaymentcapture
On payment capture the order is materialized and the cart is closed.
verified by: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderPaymentCapturedPlacesOrder, 🧪 TestCartCheckedOutRecorded, 🧪 TestOrderPlacedBirthRecorded, 🧪 TestPaymentCapturedRecorded
▸Rule: 📐 CheckoutAbortsOnPaymentFailure🔗 #rule-checkoutabortsonpaymentfailure
On payment failure the saga aborts, no order is placed and the cart stays open.
verified by: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderPaymentFailedPlacesNothing, 🧪 TestPaymentFailedRecorded
▸Rule: 📐 RefundOnRejectionOrCancellation🔗 #rule-refundonrejectionorcancellation
When a paid order is rejected, cancelled, or a refund is requested, a refund is opened as PENDING_APPROVAL for a restaurant/admin decision; nothing is refunded without approval.
verified by: 🧪 TestRefundOnOrderRejected, 🧪 TestRefundOnOrderCancelledByCustomer, 🧪 TestRefundOnOrderCancelledByRestaurant, 🧪 TestRefundOnRefundRequested
▸Rule: 📐 RefundRequiresApproval🔗 #rule-refundrequiresapproval
Only an explicit decision — by the RESTAURANT for its own orders, or by an ADMIN — resolves a pending refund: ApproveRefund (possibly partial) requests the Stripe refund, DenyRefund closes it; both are rejected when no refund is pending approval for the order.
verified by: 🧪 TestPaymentRefundApprovedRecorded, 🧪 TestPaymentRefundDeniedRecorded, 🧪 TestRefundApprovedByAdmin, 🧪 TestRefundDeniedByAdmin, 🧪 TestRefundDecisionRejectedWhenNotPending
▸Rule: 📐 RefundSettledFactRecorded🔗 #rule-refundsettledfactrecorded
The settled refund fact reported back by Stripe is recorded.
verified by: 🧪 TestRefundSettledFactRecorded, 🧪 TestPaymentRefundedRecorded
▸Rule: 📐 PendingRefundVisibleUntilDecided🔗 #rule-pendingrefundvisibleuntildecided
A refund opened for decision is recorded as a domain fact (RefundOpened on the Payment) and stays visible in the refund queue (pendingRefunds) as REQUESTED until an explicit decision resolves it; the decision and the Stripe settlement update its status (APPROVED/DENIED, then REFUNDED) instead of dropping it.
verified by: 🧪 TestPendingRefundVisibleUntilDecided
▸Rule: 📐 OrphanPaymentEventFlagged🔗 #rule-orphanpaymenteventflagged
A Stripe payment outcome that matches no known checkout run is surfaced as a typed error (PaymentEventOrphaned) — the recorded fact stands, but the anomaly is never silently skipped.
verified by: 🧪 TestPaymentCaptureOrphanIsFlagged
🧪 Tests (5)

🎭 Cart

▸Test: 🧪 TestCartFirstLineAdded🔗 #test-testcartfirstlineadded
Adds the first line to a new cart (the cart is created)
given: (none)
when: 📩 AddCartLine
then: ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
verifies: 📐 CartPricedFromLiveCatalog
▸Test: 🧪 TestCartAddLineIsRejectedWhenOfferNotOrderable🔗 #test-testcartaddlineisrejectedwhenoffernotorderable
Rejects adding a line when the offer is unknown, unavailable, or out of stock
given: (none)
when: 📩 AddCartLine
thrown: ⛔ OfferNotFound, ⛔ OfferUnavailable, ⛔ InsufficientStock
verifies: 📐 CartRejectsUnorderableOrInvalidLine
▸Test: 🧪 TestCartAddLineIsRejectedWhenCartInvalid🔗 #test-testcartaddlineisrejectedwhencartinvalid
Rejects adding a line on a missing/closed/mismatched cart, with a bad option selection, or over the quantity limit
given: ⚡ CartStarted
when: 📩 AddCartLine
thrown: ⛔ CartNotFound, ⛔ CartNotOpen, ⛔ CartRestaurantMismatch, ⛔ InvalidOptionSelection, ⛔ QuantityExceedsLimit
verifies: 📐 CartRejectsUnorderableOrInvalidLine
▸Test: 🧪 TestCartLineQuantityChanged🔗 #test-testcartlinequantitychanged
Changes the quantity of an existing cart line
given: ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
when: 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity
then: ⚡ CartLineQuantityChanged
verifies: 📐 CartPricedFromLiveCatalog
▸Test: 🧪 TestCartLineRemoved🔗 #test-testcartlineremoved
Removes a line from a cart
given: ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
when: 📩 RemoveCartLine
then: ⚡ CartLineRemoved
verifies: 📐 CartPricedFromLiveCatalog
▸Test: 🧪 TestCartRemoveLineIsRejected🔗 #test-testcartremovelineisrejected
Rejects removing a line from a missing/closed cart or a line that does not exist
given: (none)
when: 📩 RemoveCartLine
thrown: ⛔ CartNotFound, ⛔ CartNotOpen, ⛔ CartLineNotFound
verifies: 📐 CartRejectsUnorderableOrInvalidLine
▸Test: 🧪 TestCartBoundToCustomer🔗 #test-testcartboundtocustomer
A guest cart is bound to the identified customer (one-time bind)
given: ⚡ CartStarted
when: 📩 BindCartToCustomer
then: ⚡ CartBoundToCustomer
verifies: 📐 GuestCartsBoundOnIdentification
▸Test: 🧪 TestCartCheckedOutRecorded🔗 #test-testcartcheckedoutrecorded
The Cart records the checkout fact delivered by PlaceOrderProcess and closes (idempotent)
given: ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
when: 📩 CartCheckedOut
then: ⚡ CartCheckedOut
verifies: 📐 OrderMaterializedOnPaymentCapture

🎭 Order

▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderAcceptedByRestaurant🔗 #test-testorderacceptedbyrestaurant
Restaurant accepts a placed order
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced
when: 📩 AcceptOrder
then: ⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
verifies: 📐 OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderAcceptIsRejected🔗 #test-testorderacceptisrejected
Rejects accepting a missing order or one not in an acceptable status
given: (none)
when: 📩 AcceptOrder
thrown: ⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
verifies: 📐 OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderPreparationStarted🔗 #test-testorderpreparationstarted
Restaurant starts preparing an accepted order
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
when: 📩 StartPreparation
then: ⚡ OrderPreparationStarted
verifies: 📐 OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderMarkedReady🔗 #test-testordermarkedready
Restaurant marks the order ready for pickup/delivery
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant, ⚡ OrderPreparationStarted
when: 📩 MarkOrderReady
then: ⚡ OrderMarkedReady
verifies: 📐 OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderDelivered🔗 #test-testorderdelivered
The order is delivered to the customer
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderMarkedReady
when: 📩 MarkOrderDelivered
then: ⚡ OrderDelivered
verifies: 📐 OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRejected🔗 #test-testorderrejected
Restaurant rejects a placed order
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced
when: 📩 RejectOrder
then: ⚡ OrderRejectedByRestaurant
verifies: 📐 OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderCancelledByCustomer🔗 #test-testordercancelledbycustomer
Customer cancels the order before acceptance
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced
when: 📩 CancelOrderByCustomer
then: ⚡ OrderCancelledByCustomer
verifies: 📐 OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderCancelledByRestaurant🔗 #test-testordercancelledbyrestaurant
Restaurant cancels an order it had accepted
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
when: 📩 CancelOrderByRestaurant
then: ⚡ OrderCancelledByRestaurant
verifies: 📐 OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderLifecycleRejectsSkippedTransition🔗 #test-testorderlifecyclerejectsskippedtransition
Rejects a move the declared Order state machine does not contain (accepting an already-accepted order)
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
when: 📩 AcceptOrder
thrown: ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
verifies: 📐 OrderLifecycleIsExplicit, 📐 OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderLifecycleTerminalStateRefusesTransitions🔗 #test-testorderlifecycleterminalstaterefusestransitions
Rejects any lifecycle transition out of a terminal state (cancelling a delivered order)
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderMarkedReady, ⚡ OrderDelivered
when: 📩 CancelOrderByRestaurant
thrown: ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
verifies: 📐 OrderLifecycleIsExplicit, 📐 OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRated🔗 #test-testorderrated
Customer rates the delivery (rider thumb) after delivery
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderDelivered
when: 📩 RateOrder
then: ⚡ OrderRated
verifies: 📐 OrderRatedOnceWhenDelivered
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRateOrderIsRejected🔗 #test-testorderrateorderisrejected
Rejects rating the delivery of a missing/not-delivered order or rating it twice
given: (none)
when: 📩 RateOrder
thrown: ⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus, ⛔ OrderAlreadyRated
verifies: 📐 OrderRatedOnceWhenDelivered
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRestaurantRated🔗 #test-testorderrestaurantrated
Customer rates the restaurant after delivery
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderDelivered
when: 📩 RateRestaurant
then: ⚡ RestaurantRated
verifies: 📐 RestaurantRatedOncePerOrder
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRateRestaurantTwiceIsRejected🔗 #test-testorderraterestauranttwiceisrejected
Rejects rating the restaurant a second time for the same order
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderDelivered, ⚡ RestaurantRated
when: 📩 RateRestaurant
thrown: ⛔ RestaurantAlreadyRated
verifies: 📐 RestaurantRatedOncePerOrder
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderTipped🔗 #test-testordertipped
Customer tips the rider, restaurant and Captain after delivery
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderDelivered
when: 📩 TipOrder
then: ⚡ OrderTipped
verifies: 📐 TipsAdditiveMultiRecipientSeparate
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderTippedByRestaurant🔗 #test-testordertippedbyrestaurant
Restaurant tips the rider (thanking the courier)
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderDelivered
when: 📩 TipOrder
then: ⚡ OrderTipped
verifies: 📐 TipsAdditiveMultiRecipientSeparate
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderTipIsRejected🔗 #test-testordertipisrejected
Rejects tipping a missing order, or a restaurant tipping itself
given: (none)
when: 📩 TipOrder
thrown: ⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus, ⛔ InvalidTipRecipient
verifies: 📐 TipsAdditiveMultiRecipientSeparate
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRefundRequested🔗 #test-testorderrefundrequested
Customer requests a refund for a delivered order
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderDelivered
when: 📩 RequestRefund
then: ⚡ RefundRequested
verifies: 📐 RefundRequestByCustomer
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderPlacedBirthRecorded🔗 #test-testorderplacedbirthrecorded
The Order is born by recording the OrderPlaced fact delivered by PlaceOrderProcess (idempotent)
given: (none)
when: 📩 OrderPlaced
then: ⚡ OrderPlaced
verifies: 📐 OrderMaterializedOnPaymentCapture

🎭 Payment

▸Test: 🧪 TestPaymentIntentCreatedRecorded🔗 #test-testpaymentintentcreatedrecorded
The Payment is born by recording PaymentIntentCreated with the frozen checkout snapshot
given: (none)
when: 📩 PaymentIntentCreated
then: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated
verifies: 📐 CheckoutSnapshotFrozenAtIntent
▸Test: 🧪 TestPaymentCapturedRecorded🔗 #test-testpaymentcapturedrecorded
The Payment records the inbound Stripe capture fact (delivered via the ACL, idempotent)
given: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated
when: 📩 PaymentCaptured
then: ⚡ PaymentCaptured
verifies: 📐 OrderMaterializedOnPaymentCapture
▸Test: 🧪 TestPaymentFailedRecorded🔗 #test-testpaymentfailedrecorded
The Payment records the inbound Stripe failure fact (cart stays open downstream)
given: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated
when: 📩 PaymentFailed
then: ⚡ PaymentFailed
verifies: 📐 CheckoutAbortsOnPaymentFailure
▸Test: 🧪 TestPaymentRefundedRecorded🔗 #test-testpaymentrefundedrecorded
The Payment records the settled refund fact reported by Stripe (idempotent)
given: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated, ⚡ PaymentCaptured
when: 📩 PaymentRefunded
then: ⚡ PaymentRefunded
verifies: 📐 RefundSettledFactRecorded
▸Test: 🧪 TestPendingRefundVisibleUntilDecided🔗 #test-testpendingrefundvisibleuntildecided
The Payment records the opened refund (RefundOpened, idempotent) so the refund queue folds it as REQUESTED until decided
given: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated, ⚡ PaymentCaptured
when: 📩 RefundOpened
then: ⚡ RefundOpened
verifies: 📐 PendingRefundVisibleUntilDecided
▸Test: 🧪 TestPaymentRefundApprovedRecorded🔗 #test-testpaymentrefundapprovedrecorded
The Payment records the refund approval (restaurant or admin) delivered by RefundProcess
given: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated, ⚡ PaymentCaptured
when: 📩 RefundApproved
then: ⚡ RefundApproved
verifies: 📐 RefundRequiresApproval
▸Test: 🧪 TestPaymentRefundDeniedRecorded🔗 #test-testpaymentrefunddeniedrecorded
The Payment records the refund denial (restaurant or admin) delivered by RefundProcess
given: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated, ⚡ PaymentCaptured
when: 📩 RefundDenied
then: ⚡ RefundDenied
verifies: 📐 RefundRequiresApproval

🎭 PlaceOrderProcess

▸Test: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderCreatesPaymentIntent🔗 #test-testplaceordercreatespaymentintent
Checkout reads the open cart, prices it, and creates a Stripe payment intent
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantActivated, ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ ProductAdded, ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
when: 📩 PlaceOrder
then: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated
verifies: 📐 CheckoutPricesCartCreatesPaymentIntent, 📐 CheckoutSnapshotFrozenAtIntent
▸Test: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderRecomputesPriceServerSide🔗 #test-testplaceorderrecomputespriceserverside
Checkout recomputes every line total and the order total from the live catalog; a matching client confirmation total passes
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantActivated, ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ ProductAdded, ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
when: 📩 PlaceOrder
then: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated
verifies: 📐 ServerPriceAuthority
▸Test: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderRejectsPriceMismatch🔗 #test-testplaceorderrejectspricemismatch
A client confirmation total that diverges from the server-recomputed total rejects the checkout (server is the price authority)
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantActivated, ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ ProductAdded, ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
when: 📩 PlaceOrder
thrown: ⛔ PriceMismatch
verifies: 📐 ServerPriceAuthority
▸Test: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderRejectsUnresolvablePrice🔗 #test-testplaceorderrejectsunresolvableprice
A cart line whose price cannot be resolved from the live catalog rejects the checkout fail-closed (never the client's number)
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantActivated, ⚡ CatalogCreated, ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
when: 📩 PlaceOrder
thrown: ⛔ PriceUnresolvable
verifies: 📐 ServerPriceAuthority
▸Test: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderIsRejected🔗 #test-testplaceorderisrejected
Rejects checkout when the restaurant is paused, the cart is empty, the delivery address is missing or out of area, or the payment is declined
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantActivated, ⚡ CartStarted
when: 📩 PlaceOrder
thrown: ⛔ RestaurantPaused, ⛔ CartEmpty, ⛔ DeliveryAddressRequired, ⛔ OutsideDeliveryArea, ⛔ PaymentDeclined
verifies: 📐 CheckoutPricesCartCreatesPaymentIntent
▸Test: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderRejectsTestRestaurantForLiveOrder🔗 #test-testplaceorderrejectstestrestaurantforliveorder
A production (LIVE) order against a TEST restaurant is rejected (test-mode isolation)
given: ⚡ RestaurantRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantActivated, ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
when: 📩 PlaceOrder
thrown: ⛔ CannotOrderTestRestaurant
verifies: 📐 OrderTestModeIsolation
▸Test: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderPaymentCapturedPlacesOrder🔗 #test-testplaceorderpaymentcapturedplacesorder
On payment capture the saga materializes the order and closes the cart
given: ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded, ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated
when: 📩 PaymentCaptured
then: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ CartCheckedOut
verifies: 📐 OrderMaterializedOnPaymentCapture
▸Test: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderPaymentFailedPlacesNothing🔗 #test-testplaceorderpaymentfailedplacesnothing
On payment failure the saga aborts and places no order (cart stays open)
given: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated
when: 📩 PaymentFailed
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: 📐 CheckoutAbortsOnPaymentFailure
▸Test: 🧪 TestPaymentCaptureOrphanIsFlagged🔗 #test-testpaymentcaptureorphanisflagged
A capture matching no checkout run aborts the saga with a typed error (never a silent skip)
given: (none)
when: 📩 PaymentCaptured
thrown: ⛔ PaymentEventOrphaned
verifies: 📐 OrphanPaymentEventFlagged

🎭 RefundProcess

▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundOnOrderRejected🔗 #test-testrefundonorderrejected
Requests a Stripe refund when an order is rejected by the restaurant
given: (none)
when: 📩 OrderRejectedByRestaurant
then: ⚡ RefundOpened
verifies: 📐 RefundOnRejectionOrCancellation
▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundOnOrderCancelledByCustomer🔗 #test-testrefundonordercancelledbycustomer
Requests a Stripe refund when the customer cancels the order
given: (none)
when: 📩 OrderCancelledByCustomer
then: ⚡ RefundOpened
verifies: 📐 RefundOnRejectionOrCancellation
▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundOnOrderCancelledByRestaurant🔗 #test-testrefundonordercancelledbyrestaurant
Requests a Stripe refund when the restaurant cancels the order
given: (none)
when: 📩 OrderCancelledByRestaurant
then: ⚡ RefundOpened
verifies: 📐 RefundOnRejectionOrCancellation
▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundOnRefundRequested🔗 #test-testrefundonrefundrequested
Validates eligibility and requests a Stripe refund on a customer refund request
given: (none)
when: 📩 RefundRequested
then: ⚡ RefundOpened
verifies: 📐 RefundOnRejectionOrCancellation
▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundSettledFactRecorded🔗 #test-testrefundsettledfactrecorded
Records the settled refund fact reported back by Stripe
given: (none)
when: 📩 PaymentRefunded
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: 📐 RefundSettledFactRecorded
▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundApprovedByAdmin🔗 #test-testrefundapprovedbyadmin
The restaurant or an admin approves the pending refund: Stripe refund requested, decision recorded on the Payment
given: ⚡ RefundRequested
when: 📩 ApproveRefund
then: ⚡ RefundApproved
verifies: 📐 RefundRequiresApproval
▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundDeniedByAdmin🔗 #test-testrefunddeniedbyadmin
The restaurant or an admin denies the pending refund: the run closes with the decision recorded on the Payment
given: ⚡ RefundRequested
when: 📩 DenyRefund
then: ⚡ RefundDenied
verifies: 📐 RefundRequiresApproval
▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundDecisionRejectedWhenNotPending🔗 #test-testrefunddecisionrejectedwhennotpending
A refund decision on an order with no refund pending approval is rejected
given: (none)
when: 📩 ApproveRefund
thrown: ⛔ RefundNotPending
verifies: 📐 RefundRequiresApproval

🔲 4. customer 🔗
Customer-facing consumer domain: discovery/browse, identity (phone-keyed), favorites, profile, address book, cart & ordering use-cases; cart binding.
🧰 API operations (19)
▸Query: 🔎 paymentStatus🔗 #query-paymentstatus
The checkout payment state for an order (ADR-20260720-015500): paymentIntentId, clientSecret while the run is in flight, and the folded PaymentStatus — the read-side home of the values placeOrder used to return. Served from the PlaceOrderProcess run row (the declared exception to PM-table privacy). Literal roles [PUBLIC, CUSTOMER, ADMIN] (#13/#31): the checkout paths only, ownership-scoped in the resolver — the checkout's customer, its anonymous session (X-SESSION-ID), or ADMIN; strangers resolve null (never an existence oracle).
input: 🧩 PaymentStatusQueryInput! { orderId: 🔤 OrderId }
returns: 🧩 PaymentIntent · reads —
roles: PUBLIC, CUSTOMER, ADMIN · V0
▸Query: 🔎 me🔗 #query-me
The signed-in customer's own profile (resolves the session authRef → Customer via Customer).
input: (none)
returns: 🧩 CustomerProfile · reads 🗄️ Customer
roles: CUSTOMER · V1
▸Query: 🔎 favoriteRestaurants🔗 #query-favoriterestaurants
The customer's favorited restaurants (Customer.favorite_restaurant_ids joined to Restaurant).
input: 🧩 FavoriteRestaurantsQueryInput! { customerId: 🔤 CustomerId }
returns: 🧩 Restaurant [] · reads 🗄️ Restaurant
roles: CUSTOMER · V1
▸Query: 🔎 carts🔗 #query-carts
A customer's carts (one OPEN cart per restaurant).
input: 🧩 CartsQueryInput! { customerId: 🔤 CustomerId }
returns: 🧩 Cart [] · reads 🗄️ Cart
roles: CUSTOMER, ADMIN · V0

command: 📩 RequestPhoneVerification → 🎭 Customer

▸Subscription: 🔔 paymentStatusChanged🔗 #subscription-paymentstatuschanged
Checkout payment-state changes for one order (the push counterpart of queries/paymentStatus, ADR-20260720-015500): re-resolves the PlaceOrderProcess run row on Payment-stream events, so the checkout page receives the clientSecret and the terminal CAPTURED/FAILED without polling. Literal roles like the query (#31), ownership-scoped at stream setup (customer / session / ADMIN) — strangers get an empty stream.
input: 🧩 PaymentStatusChangedSubscriptionInput! { orderId: 🔤 OrderId }
streams: 🧩 PaymentIntent
roles: PUBLIC, CUSTOMER, ADMIN · V0
🧩 Output types (1)
▸Type: 🧩 CustomerProfile🔗 #type-customerprofile
A customer's own profile (display name + contact). Backed by the identity read model; surfaced to the customer only (profile management is V1 — no V0 query yet).
read model: 🗄️ Customer
FieldTypeReq.
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
displayName🔤 CustomerDisplayName⬜ nullable
email🔤 EmailAddress⬜ nullable
emailVerifiedboolean✅ required
phone🔤 PhoneNumber✅ required
locale🔤 Locale⬜ nullable
timezone🔤 TimeZone⬜ nullable
🎭 Actors (2)
▸Actor: 🎭 Customer🔗 #actor-customer
A customer identity, keyed by phone number and linked to the auth provider user (authRef).
🧩 aggregate
ReceivesEmits →Throws
📩 RequestPhoneVerificationDelegate to Supabase Auth: send an SMS OTP (Twilio; mock in dev). No event.—
📩 VerifyPhone⚡ CustomerRegistered, ⚡ CustomerIdentified⛔ InvalidVerificationCode, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired
📩 RequestEmailVerificationDelegate to Supabase Auth: send an email magic link (localized via the stored locale). No event.⛔ EmailAlreadyInUse
📩 ConfirmEmailVerification⚡ CustomerEmailVerified⛔ InvalidVerificationToken, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired
📩 RequestPhoneChangeDelegate to Supabase Auth: send an SMS OTP to the new phone. No event.⛔ PhoneAlreadyInUse
📩 ConfirmPhoneChange⚡ CustomerPhoneChanged⛔ InvalidVerificationCode, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired, ⛔ PhoneAlreadyInUse
📩 ChangeLanguage⚡ CustomerLanguageChanged—
📩 MarkRestaurantAsFavorite⚡ RestaurantFavorited⛔ RestaurantNotFound
📩 UnmarkRestaurantAsFavorite⚡ RestaurantUnfavorited—
📩 UpdateCustomerInfo⚡ CustomerInfoUpdated⛔ NoEditableFieldProvided
📩 SetCustomerPreferences⚡ CustomerPreferencesSet—
📩 SetCustomerAddress⚡ CustomerAddressSet—
📩 RemoveCustomerAddress⚡ CustomerAddressRemoved—
📩 SetCustomerPaymentMethod⚡ CustomerPaymentMethodSet—
▸Actor: 🎭 CartBindingProcess🔗 #actor-cartbindingprocess
Binds a returning visitor's OPEN guest carts to their Customer. Reacts to CustomerIdentified (authRef → customerId) by sending BindCartToCustomer for each OPEN cart of the session — the Cart aggregate owns the bind fact (CartBoundToCustomer); the state row makes a re-delivered CustomerIdentified a no-op.
⚙️ process manager
ReceivesEmits →Throws
⚡ CustomerIdentified⚡ CartBoundToCustomer—
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant IN as Inbox (trigger)
  participant PM as CartBindingProcess (decides)
  participant ST as cart_binding_process_manager (state)
  participant RM_Cart as Cart (read model)
  participant AG_Cart as Cart (aggregate)
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: CustomerIdentified (event)
  PM->>RM_Cart: read as open_carts [session_id=CustomerIdentified.sessionId, status=OPEN]
  PM->>AG_Cart: send BindCartToCustomer (for each open_carts) — the aggregate validates
  PM->>ST: set session_id=CustomerIdentified.sessionId, customer_id=CustomerIdentified.customerId
  end
🗄️ Views (1)
▸View: 🗄️ Customer🔗 #view-customer
source: 🎭 Customer · 🛶 V0
Identity/lookup read model: resolves a returning phone (or auth_ref) to an existing Customer, backs VerifyPhone idempotency + auth resolution, and serves the `me` query (CustomerProfile). Also bound when CustomerIdentified stamps carts. The stored `locale` localizes authenticated SMS/email sends.
fed by: ⚡ CustomerRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantRated, ⚡ RestaurantFavorited, ⚡ RestaurantUnfavorited, ⚡ CustomerInfoUpdated, ⚡ CustomerEmailVerified, ⚡ CustomerPhoneChanged, ⚡ CustomerLanguageChanged, ⚡ CustomerPreferencesSet, ⚡ CustomerAddressSet, ⚡ CustomerAddressRemoved, ⚡ CustomerPaymentMethodSet
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
customer_id🔤 CustomerId (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.customerIdPK
phone🔤 PhoneNumber (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.phone, ⚡ CustomerPhoneChanged.phoneunique
auth_ref🔤 ExternalReference (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.authRefindex, nullableAuth provider user id (Supabase Auth) → Customer.
display_name🔤 CustomerDisplayName (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.displayName, ⚡ CustomerInfoUpdated.displayNamenullable
email🔤 EmailAddress (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.email, ⚡ CustomerEmailVerified.emailnullable
email_verifiedboolean⚡ CustomerEmailVerified—True once an email magic link has been confirmed (CustomerEmailVerified).
locale🔤 Locale (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.locale, ⚡ CustomerLanguageChanged.localenullablei18n culture; set at registration or via ChangeLanguage. Localizes authenticated SMS/email sends.
timezone🔤 TimeZone (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.timezone, ⚡ CustomerPreferencesSet.timezonenullable
ratingsjsonb⚡ RestaurantRated—The customer's own submitted ratings (assembled from RestaurantRated): [{ order_id, restaurant_id, stars, comment, rated_at }].
favorite_restaurant_idsjsonb⚡ RestaurantFavorited, ⚡ RestaurantUnfavorited—[restaurant_id] the customer favorited.
preferencesjsonb⚡ CustomerPreferencesSetnullable{ dietary_tags: [...], favorite_cuisines: [...] } from CustomerPreferencesSet.
addressesjsonb⚡ CustomerAddressSet, ⚡ CustomerAddressRemoved—Saved address book: [{ address_id, label, address }] from CustomerAddressSet/Removed.
payment_method_id🔤 PaymentMethodId (derived)⚡ CustomerPaymentMethodSet.paymentMethodIdnullable
created_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
updated_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
📩 Commands (14)
▸Command: 📩 RequestPhoneVerification🔗 #command-requestphoneverification
Ask Supabase Auth to send an SMS OTP to a phone (Twilio; a mock provider in dev). Emits no event. `locale` localizes the message; when absent it defaults from the dialing code (e.g. '+33' → fr-FR).
dispatched by: ✏️ requestPhoneVerification · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: —
throws: —
FieldTypeReq.Description
dialingCode🔤 DialingCode✅ required
nationalNumber🔤 NationalPhoneNumber✅ required
locale🔤 Locale⬜ nullableSMS language; defaults from the dialing code's country when absent.
▸Command: 📩 VerifyPhone🔗 #command-verifyphone
Verify the SMS OTP with Supabase Auth, then register-or-identify: a first verified phone CREATES the Customer (CustomerRegistered), a returning phone RESOLVES + signs in (CustomerIdentified). The backend decides new-vs-returning; the client never calls register/identify directly.
dispatched by: ✏️ verifyPhone · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: ⚡ CustomerRegistered, ⚡ CustomerIdentified
throws: ⛔ InvalidVerificationCode, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ requiredClient-generated id, used only when the phone is new; ignored for a returning phone.
dialingCode🔤 DialingCode✅ required
nationalNumber🔤 NationalPhoneNumber✅ required
code🔤 OtpCode✅ required
sessionId🔤 SessionId✅ requiredThe visitor session verifying the phone — carried onto CustomerIdentified so CartBindingProcess binds this session's open carts.
displayName🔤 CustomerDisplayName⬜ nullable
locale🔤 Locale⬜ nullablePersisted on registration; defaults from the dialing code when absent.
timezone🔤 TimeZone⬜ nullable
▸Command: 📩 RequestEmailVerification🔗 #command-requestemailverification
Ask Supabase Auth to email a magic link to verify/link an email for the signed-in customer. Emits no event; the message is localized via the customer's STORED locale (no per-call language param).
dispatched by: ✏️ requestEmailVerification · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: —
throws: ⛔ EmailAlreadyInUse
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
email🔤 EmailAddress✅ required
▸Command: 📩 ConfirmEmailVerification🔗 #command-confirmemailverification
Confirm an email magic link: the client returns the Supabase token, we VERIFY it server-side and link the now-verified email to the Customer. Used for both the initial email and later changes.
dispatched by: ✏️ confirmEmailVerification · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: ⚡ CustomerEmailVerified
throws: ⛔ InvalidVerificationToken, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
token🔤 EmailVerificationToken✅ required
▸Command: 📩 RequestPhoneChange🔗 #command-requestphonechange
Ask Supabase to send an SMS OTP to a NEW phone for a signed-in customer (stored locale). Emits no event.
dispatched by: ✏️ requestPhoneChange · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: —
throws: ⛔ PhoneAlreadyInUse
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
newDialingCode🔤 DialingCode✅ required
newNationalNumber🔤 NationalPhoneNumber✅ required
▸Command: 📩 ConfirmPhoneChange🔗 #command-confirmphonechange
Verify the OTP on the new phone and change the customer's phone (→ canonical E.164 PhoneNumber).
dispatched by: ✏️ confirmPhoneChange · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: ⚡ CustomerPhoneChanged
throws: ⛔ InvalidVerificationCode, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired, ⛔ PhoneAlreadyInUse
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
newDialingCode🔤 DialingCode✅ required
newNationalNumber🔤 NationalPhoneNumber✅ required
code🔤 OtpCode✅ required
▸Command: 📩 ChangeLanguage🔗 #command-changelanguage
Persist the customer's preferred language (the single locale setter). The stored locale then localizes subsequent authenticated SMS/email sends — so they need no per-call language param.
dispatched by: ✏️ changeLanguage · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: ⚡ CustomerLanguageChanged
throws: —
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
locale🔤 Locale✅ required

⚡ Events (12)
▸Event: ⚡ CustomerRegistered🔗 #event-customerregistered
A customer account was created on first phone verification (passwordless OTP, identity managed by the auth provider). Phone number is the primary identifier.
emitted by: 🎭 Customer
consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ Customer
FieldTypeReq.Description
mode🔤 Mode⬜ optional
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
authRef🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullableAuth provider user id (e.g. Supabase Auth), linking identity to this Customer.
phone🔤 PhoneNumber✅ required
displayName🔤 CustomerDisplayName⬜ nullable
email🔤 EmailAddress⬜ nullableOptional, e.g. captured later for receipts.
locale🔤 Locale⬜ nullablePreferred culture (language + date/time/number display).
timezone🔤 TimeZone⬜ nullable
▸Event: ⚡ CustomerIdentified🔗 #event-customeridentified
A returning visitor signed in and was resolved to an existing Customer (authRef → customerId). NOT an auth event (OTP/session live in the auth provider): this records the DOMAIN fact so the visitor's OPEN guest carts can be bound to the customerId — letting carts started on different devices converge under one customer and be merged at checkout. Thanks to the sessionId, the existing open cart(s) can be bound to the customerId and merged at checkout. This is a domain event, not an auth event.
emitted by: 🎭 Customer
consumed by: 🎭 CartBindingProcess
projected into: —
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
authRef🔤 ExternalReference✅ requiredAuth provider user id that was matched to this Customer (via Customer.auth_ref).
sessionId🔤 SessionId✅ requiredSession id (ADR-0041) for the sign-in event; not required for cart binding.

projected into: 🗄️ Customer

customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
