🔤 Scalars (7)
ScalarTypeDescription
🔤 AddressIdstring uuidIdentifies a saved address in a customer's address book.
🔤 PaymentMethodIdstringStripe PaymentMethod id (provider reference). Example: 'pm_1Nabc...'.
🔤 DialingCodestring ^\+[0-9]{1,4}$Country dialing/calling code in '+NN' form (e.g. '+33', '+1'). This is what the phone-country picker emits and what the auth commands receive — NOT the ISO country code.
🔤 NationalPhoneNumberstringNational (subscriber) part of a phone number, without the dialing code. E.g. '0612345678' or '612345678'.
🔤 OtpCodestring ^[0-9]{4,8}$One-time SMS code from Supabase Auth (sent via Twilio; a mock provider in dev).
🔤 EmailVerificationTokenstringOpaque Supabase token from an email magic link; verified server-side (never trusted as a bare client claim).
🔤 Localestring ^[a-z]{2}-[A-Z]{2}$i18n culture code, language-REGION (BCP 47 / .NET CultureInfo). Example: 'fr-FR', 'en-US'. Drives the UI language AND the display of dates, times and numbers (paired with TimeZone for the zone).
⛔ Errors (5)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
⛔ InvalidVerificationCodeThe SMS OTP code does not match (rejected by Supabase Auth).🇬🇧 The verification code is incorrect. Please try again.🇫🇷 Le code de vérification est incorrect. Veuillez réessayer.📩 VerifyPhone, 📩 ConfirmPhoneChange
⛔ VerificationCodeExpiredThe SMS OTP (or email link) has expired; request a new one.🇬🇧 The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.🇫🇷 Le code de vérification a expiré. Veuillez en demander un nouveau.📩 VerifyPhone, 📩 ConfirmEmailVerification, 📩 ConfirmPhoneChange
⛔ InvalidVerificationTokenThe email magic-link token failed server-side verification with Supabase Auth.🇬🇧 This email verification link is invalid or has already been used.🇫🇷 Ce lien de vérification d'e-mail est invalide ou a déjà été utilisé.📩 ConfirmEmailVerification
⛔ EmailAlreadyInUseThe email is already linked to another customer.🇬🇧 The email '{email}' is already in use by another account.🇫🇷 L'e-mail '{email}' est déjà utilisé par un autre compte.📩 RequestEmailVerification
⛔ PhoneAlreadyInUseThe phone number is already linked to another customer (on change).🇬🇧 The phone number '{phone}' is already in use by another account.🇫🇷 Le numéro '{phone}' est déjà utilisé par un autre compte.📩 RequestPhoneChange, 📩 ConfirmPhoneChange
📐 Business rules (9)
▸Rule: 📐 PhoneVerificationRegistersOrIdentifies🔗 #rule-phoneverificationregistersoridentifies
Phone-OTP verification registers a new customer or identifies a returning one; an invalid code is rejected.
verified by: 🧪 TestCustomerRequestPhoneVerification, 🧪 TestCustomerVerifyPhoneRegisters, 🧪 TestCustomerVerifyPhoneReturningIdentifies, 🧪 TestCustomerVerifyPhoneIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 EmailVerificationUniqueTokenValid🔗 #rule-emailverificationuniquetokenvalid
Email verification requires a unique email and a valid token; duplicates/invalid tokens are rejected.
verified by: 🧪 TestCustomerRequestEmailVerification, 🧪 TestCustomerRequestEmailVerificationDuplicateIsRejected, 🧪 TestCustomerConfirmEmailVerification, 🧪 TestCustomerConfirmEmailInvalidTokenIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 PhoneChangeVerifiedAndUnique🔗 #rule-phonechangeverifiedandunique
A phone change is verified and must be unique; a duplicate is rejected.
verified by: 🧪 TestCustomerRequestPhoneChange, 🧪 TestCustomerRequestPhoneChangeDuplicateIsRejected, 🧪 TestCustomerConfirmPhoneChange
▸Rule: 📐 CustomerProfileUpdate🔗 #rule-customerprofileupdate
A customer can change language and profile info; an update with no field is rejected.
verified by: 🧪 TestCustomerChangeLanguage, 🧪 TestCustomerInfoUpdated, 🧪 TestCustomerUpdateWithoutFieldIsRejected
▸Rule: 📐 CustomerPreferences🔗 #rule-customerpreferences
A customer's preferences can be set.
verified by: 🧪 TestCustomerPreferencesSet
▸Rule: 📐 FavoritesManagement🔗 #rule-favoritesmanagement
A customer can favorite/unfavorite restaurants; favoriting an unknown one is rejected and unfavoriting a non-favorite is a no-op.
verified by: 🧪 TestCustomerRestaurantFavorited, 🧪 TestCustomerFavoriteUnknownRestaurantIsRejected, 🧪 TestCustomerRestaurantUnfavorited, 🧪 TestCustomerUnfavoriteNonFavoriteIsNoOp
▸Rule: 📐 AddressBookManagement🔗 #rule-addressbookmanagement
A customer can add/update and remove saved delivery addresses.
verified by: 🧪 TestCustomerAddressSet, 🧪 TestCustomerAddressRemoved
▸Rule: 📐 PaymentMethodStorage🔗 #rule-paymentmethodstorage
A customer's payment method can be stored.
verified by: 🧪 TestCustomerPaymentMethodSet
▸Rule: 📐 GuestCartsBoundOnIdentification🔗 #rule-guestcartsboundonidentification
A returning visitor's open guest carts are bound to their Customer on identification.
verified by: 🧪 TestCartBindingOnCustomerIdentified, 🧪 TestCartBoundToCustomer
🧪 Tests (2)

🎭 Customer

▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerRequestPhoneVerification🔗 #test-testcustomerrequestphoneverification
Sends an SMS OTP to a phone (localized via the dialing code); emits nothing
given: (none)
when: 📩 RequestPhoneVerification
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: 📐 PhoneVerificationRegistersOrIdentifies
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerVerifyPhoneRegisters🔗 #test-testcustomerverifyphoneregisters
Verifying the OTP on a new phone registers the customer
given: (none)
when: 📩 VerifyPhone
then: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
verifies: 📐 PhoneVerificationRegistersOrIdentifies
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerVerifyPhoneReturningIdentifies🔗 #test-testcustomerverifyphonereturningidentifies
Verifying the OTP on a known phone identifies the returning customer
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 VerifyPhone
then: ⚡ CustomerIdentified
verifies: 📐 PhoneVerificationRegistersOrIdentifies
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerVerifyPhoneIsRejected🔗 #test-testcustomerverifyphoneisrejected
Rejects phone verification when the OTP is wrong or expired
given: (none)
when: 📩 VerifyPhone
thrown: ⛔ InvalidVerificationCode, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired
verifies: 📐 PhoneVerificationRegistersOrIdentifies
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerRequestEmailVerification🔗 #test-testcustomerrequestemailverification
Sends an email magic link to verify/link an email; emits nothing
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 RequestEmailVerification
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: 📐 EmailVerificationUniqueTokenValid
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerRequestEmailVerificationDuplicateIsRejected🔗 #test-testcustomerrequestemailverificationduplicateisrejected
Rejects requesting email verification for an email already used by another account
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 RequestEmailVerification
thrown: ⛔ EmailAlreadyInUse
verifies: 📐 EmailVerificationUniqueTokenValid
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerConfirmEmailVerification🔗 #test-testcustomerconfirmemailverification
Confirms the email magic link (token verified server-side) and links the email
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 ConfirmEmailVerification
then: ⚡ CustomerEmailVerified
verifies: 📐 EmailVerificationUniqueTokenValid
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerConfirmEmailInvalidTokenIsRejected🔗 #test-testcustomerconfirmemailinvalidtokenisrejected
Rejects email confirmation when the magic-link token is invalid or expired
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 ConfirmEmailVerification
thrown: ⛔ InvalidVerificationToken, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired
verifies: 📐 EmailVerificationUniqueTokenValid
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerRequestPhoneChange🔗 #test-testcustomerrequestphonechange
Sends an OTP to a new phone for a phone change; emits nothing
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 RequestPhoneChange
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: 📐 PhoneChangeVerifiedAndUnique
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerRequestPhoneChangeDuplicateIsRejected🔗 #test-testcustomerrequestphonechangeduplicateisrejected
Rejects changing to a phone already used by another account
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 RequestPhoneChange
thrown: ⛔ PhoneAlreadyInUse
verifies: 📐 PhoneChangeVerifiedAndUnique
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerConfirmPhoneChange🔗 #test-testcustomerconfirmphonechange
Confirms the OTP on the new phone and changes the phone
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 ConfirmPhoneChange
then: ⚡ CustomerPhoneChanged
verifies: 📐 PhoneChangeVerifiedAndUnique
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerChangeLanguage🔗 #test-testcustomerchangelanguage
Persists the customer's preferred language
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 ChangeLanguage
then: ⚡ CustomerLanguageChanged
verifies: 📐 CustomerProfileUpdate
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerInfoUpdated🔗 #test-testcustomerinfoupdated
Updates the customer's display name
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 UpdateCustomerInfo
then: ⚡ CustomerInfoUpdated
verifies: 📐 CustomerProfileUpdate
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerUpdateWithoutFieldIsRejected🔗 #test-testcustomerupdatewithoutfieldisrejected
Rejects a customer update that carries no editable field
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 UpdateCustomerInfo
thrown: ⛔ NoEditableFieldProvided
verifies: 📐 CustomerProfileUpdate
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerPreferencesSet🔗 #test-testcustomerpreferencesset
Sets the customer's discovery preferences (timezone + dietary tags)
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 SetCustomerPreferences
then: ⚡ CustomerPreferencesSet
verifies: 📐 CustomerPreferences
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerRestaurantFavorited🔗 #test-testcustomerrestaurantfavorited
Marks a restaurant as favorite
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantRegistered
when: 📩 MarkRestaurantAsFavorite
then: ⚡ RestaurantFavorited

▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerFavoriteUnknownRestaurantIsRejected🔗 #test-testcustomerfavoriteunknownrestaurantisrejected
Rejects favoriting a restaurant that does not exist
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 MarkRestaurantAsFavorite
thrown: ⛔ RestaurantNotFound
verifies: 📐 FavoritesManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerRestaurantUnfavorited🔗 #test-testcustomerrestaurantunfavorited
Removes a restaurant from favorites
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantFavorited
when: 📩 UnmarkRestaurantAsFavorite
then: ⚡ RestaurantUnfavorited
verifies: 📐 FavoritesManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerUnfavoriteNonFavoriteIsNoOp🔗 #test-testcustomerunfavoritenonfavoriteisnoop
Unfavoriting a restaurant that is not a favorite is a no-op (idempotent)
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 UnmarkRestaurantAsFavorite
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: 📐 FavoritesManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerAddressSet🔗 #test-testcustomeraddressset
Saves a delivery address in the customer's address book
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 SetCustomerAddress
then: ⚡ CustomerAddressSet
verifies: 📐 AddressBookManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerAddressRemoved🔗 #test-testcustomeraddressremoved
Removes a saved address from the address book
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered, ⚡ CustomerAddressSet
when: 📩 RemoveCustomerAddress
then: ⚡ CustomerAddressRemoved
verifies: 📐 AddressBookManagement
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerPaymentMethodSet🔗 #test-testcustomerpaymentmethodset
Sets the customer's preferred Stripe payment method
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 SetCustomerPaymentMethod
then: ⚡ CustomerPaymentMethodSet
verifies: 📐 PaymentMethodStorage

criticality: high
workflow: · command 📩 VerifyPhone

run identity
IdSourceReq.Business key
correlation_idcommand.correlation_id✅—
trace_idotel.trace_id✅—

spans (* = required attribute)
SpanKindReq.MultiplicityAttributes
command.receiveSERVER✅—business.command_type*
otp.verifyCLIENT✅—messaging.system*, business.result*
event.store.appendINTERNAL✅—business.event_type*
event.publishPRODUCER✅—business.event_type*

success ⇐ spans: command.receive, otp.verify, event.store.append, event.publish
SLOs: p95 ≤ 600ms · p99 ≤ 1200ms · error ≤ 2%
🔲 5. delivery 🔗
Delivery fulfilment: dispatch of ready DELIVERY orders to a partner (Avelo37) and/or independent riders, courier assignment, status tracking to hand-over (ADR-0031).
🧰 API operations (11)
▸Query: 🔎 delivery🔗 #query-delivery
The delivery job of an order (tracking); owning customer, the restaurant/admin, or the assigned rider. Ownership enforced server-side.
input: 🧩 DeliveryQueryInput! { orderId: 🔤 OrderId }
returns: 🧩 DeliveryJob · reads 🗄️ View_DeliveryJob
roles: CUSTOMER, RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT, RIDER, ADMIN · V0
▸Query: 🔎 myDeliveries🔗 #query-mydeliveries
The independent rider's assigned/available delivery jobs (rider app).
input: 🧩 MyDeliveriesQueryInput { status?: 🔤 DeliveryStatus }
returns: 🧩 DeliveryJob [] · reads 🗄️ View_DeliveryJob
roles: RIDER · V0
▸Query: 🔎 deliveryPartnerAvailabilities🔗 #query-deliverypartneravailabilities
Delivery-partner city-availability registrations (#61): a partner (EXTERNAL) reviews the state of its own submissions and an admin works the review queue. Optional filters by city, channel and status (status = PENDING is the admin review queue). EXTERNAL is a trusted partner-ACL role — no per-owner narrowing in this slice (a recorded gap; contact-scoped narrowing is a follow-up).
input: 🧩 DeliveryPartnerAvailabilitiesQueryInput { cityId?: 🔤 CityId, channel?: 🔤 DeliveryChannelKey, status?: 🔤 CityAvailabilityStatus }
returns: 🧩 DeliveryPartnerAvailability [] · reads 🗄️ View_DeliveryPartnerAvailability
roles: EXTERNAL, ADMIN · V1
▸Mutation: ✏️ acceptDelivery🔗 #mutation-acceptdelivery
command: 📩 AcceptDelivery → 🎭 DeliveryJob
roles: RIDER · V0
returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)
▸Mutation: ✏️ confirmPickup🔗 #mutation-confirmpickup
command: 📩 ConfirmPickup → 🎭 DeliveryJob
roles: RIDER · V0
returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)
▸Mutation: ✏️ completeDelivery🔗 #mutation-completedelivery
command: 📩 CompleteDelivery → 🎭 DeliveryJob
roles: RIDER · V0
returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)
▸Mutation: ✏️ cancelDelivery🔗 #mutation-canceldelivery
command: 📩 CancelDelivery → 🎭 DeliveryJob
roles: RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT, ADMIN · V0
returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)
▸Mutation: ✏️ escalateDelivery🔗 #mutation-escalatedelivery
command: 📩 EscalateDelivery → 🎭 DeliveryJob
roles: RESTAURANT, ADMIN · V0
returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)
▸Mutation: ✏️ registerDeliveryPartnerAvailability🔗 #mutation-registerdeliverypartneravailability
command: 📩 RegisterDeliveryPartnerAvailability → 🎭 DeliveryPartnerRegistration
roles: EXTERNAL, ADMIN · V1
returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)
▸Mutation: ✏️ approveDeliveryPartnerAvailability🔗 #mutation-approvedeliverypartneravailability
command: 📩 ApproveDeliveryPartnerAvailability → 🎭 DeliveryPartnerRegistration
roles: ADMIN · V1
returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)
▸Mutation: ✏️ revokeDeliveryPartnerAvailability🔗 #mutation-revokedeliverypartneravailability
command: 📩 RevokeDeliveryPartnerAvailability → 🎭 DeliveryPartnerRegistration
roles: EXTERNAL, ADMIN · V1
returns: 🧩 MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first — outcome via 🔎 operationStatus)
🧩 Output types (2)
▸Type: 🧩 DeliveryJob🔗 #type-deliveryjob
One delivery of an order (ADR-0031): status, courier, addresses and ETAs. Serves the rider job list, the restaurant delivery board and admin.
read model: 🗄️ View_DeliveryJob
FieldTypeReq.
id🔤 DeliveryJobId✅ required
orderId🔤 OrderId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
status🔤 DeliveryStatus✅ required
provider🔤 DeliveryProvider⬜ nullable
courier📦 Courier⬜ nullable
pickupAddress📦 Address✅ required
dropoffAddress📦 Address✅ required
estimatedPickupAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
estimatedDropoffAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
requestedAtstring date-time✅ required
pickedUpAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
deliveredAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
▸Type: 🧩 DeliveryPartnerAvailability🔗 #type-deliverypartneravailability
A delivery partner's declared availability to serve a city on a catalog channel, with its review status (#61). Serves the EXTERNAL partner portal + the admin review queue.
read model: 🗄️ View_DeliveryPartnerAvailability
FieldTypeReq.
registrationId🔤 DeliveryPartnerRegistrationId✅ required
channel🔤 DeliveryChannelKey✅ required
cityId🔤 CityId✅ required
partnerName🔤 DeliveryPartnerName✅ required
contactEmail🔤 EmailAddress✅ required
status🔤 CityAvailabilityStatus✅ required
requestedAtstring date-time✅ required
decidedAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
🎭 Actors (4)
▸Actor: 🎭 DeliveryPartnerRegistration🔗 #actor-deliverypartnerregistration
A delivery partner's self-registration of availability to serve one city on one catalog channel (#61); id = registrationId. RegisterDeliveryPartnerAvailability is its birth (lands PENDING); an admin approves it, and the partner or an admin may revoke it. Status invariants read only this stream's fold — the review state, not referential FK integrity (channel/city existence is enforced at the boundary, a follow-up). The approved set is the substrate the #60 city dispatch ranking consumes (wiring deferred).
🧩 aggregate
ReceivesEmits →Throws
📩 RegisterDeliveryPartnerAvailability⚡ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityRequested⛔ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityAlreadyRequested
📩 ApproveDeliveryPartnerAvailability⚡ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityApproved⛔ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityNotFound, ⛔ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityNotPending
📩 RevokeDeliveryPartnerAvailability⚡ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityRevoked⛔ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityNotFound
▸Actor: 🎭 DeliveryJob🔗 #actor-deliveryjob
One delivery of an order (bounded context: delivery). Born from DeliveryRequested (emitted by DeliveryDispatchProcess), then fulfilled by EITHER an independent Captain rider (these commands) OR a delivery partner (inbound DeliveryAcceptedByPartner/RejectedByPartner/StatusUpdated, recorded via the avelo37-acl — no command). ADR-0031.
🧩 aggregate
ReceivesEmits →Throws
⚡ DeliveryRequested⚡ DeliveryRequested—
⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner—
⚡ DeliveryRejectedByPartner⚡ DeliveryRejectedByPartner—
⚡ DeliveryOfferTimedOut⚡ DeliveryOfferTimedOut—
⚡ DeliveryStatusUpdated⚡ DeliveryStatusUpdated—
⚡ DeliveryDispatchFailed⚡ DeliveryDispatchFailed—
📩 AcceptDelivery⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByRider⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound, ⛔ InvalidDeliveryStatus, ⛔ DeliveryAlreadyAssigned
📩 ConfirmPickup⚡ DeliveryPickedUp⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound, ⛔ InvalidDeliveryStatus
📩 CompleteDelivery⚡ DeliveryCompleted⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound, ⛔ InvalidDeliveryStatus
📩 CancelDelivery⚡ DeliveryCancelled⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound, ⛔ InvalidDeliveryStatus
📩 EscalateDelivery⚡ DeliveryEscalationRequested⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound
📩 ReportDeliveryIssue⚡ DeliveryIssueReported⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound, ⛔ InvalidDeliveryStatus
📩 ResolveDeliveryIssue⚡ DeliveryIssueResolved⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound, ⛔ InvalidDeliveryStatus
📩 UpdateDeliveryStatus⚡ DeliveryStatusUpdated⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound, ⛔ InvalidDeliveryStatus
📩 AssignDeliveryToPartner⚡ DeliveryAssignedToPartner⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound, ⛔ InvalidDeliveryStatus, ⛔ DeliveryAlreadyAssigned

  PICKED_UP --> CANCELLED : DeliveryCancelled

  PENDING --> FAILED : DeliveryDispatchFailed

A rider identity, linked to the auth provider user (authRef).
🧩 aggregate
ReceivesEmits →Throws
📩 RegisterRider⚡ RiderRegistered⛔ RiderAlreadyRegistered
📩 UpdateRiderInfo⚡ RiderInfoUpdated⛔ RiderNotFound, ⛔ NoEditableFieldProvided
📩 ChangeRiderStatus⚡ RiderStatusChanged⛔ RiderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidRiderStatusTransition
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> OFFLINE : RiderRegistered(status)
  OFFLINE --> AVAILABLE : RiderStatusChanged(status)
  ON_DELIVERY --> AVAILABLE : RiderStatusChanged(status)
  AVAILABLE --> OFFLINE : RiderStatusChanged(status)
  SUSPENDED --> OFFLINE : RiderStatusChanged(status)
  AVAILABLE --> ON_DELIVERY : RiderStatusChanged(status)
  OFFLINE --> SUSPENDED : RiderStatusChanged(status)
  AVAILABLE --> SUSPENDED : RiderStatusChanged(status)
  ON_DELIVERY --> SUSPENDED : RiderStatusChanged(status)
  SUSPENDED --> SUSPENDED : RiderStatusChanged(status)
▸Actor: 🎭 DeliveryDispatchProcess🔗 #actor-deliverydispatchprocess
Dispatches and tracks deliveries (bounded context: delivery, ADR-0031; resolve→walk strategy, #60). When a DELIVERY order is marked ready, delivers the DeliveryRequested birth to the DeliveryJob (deterministic UUIDv5 job id from the order id = idempotency key), then RESOLVES a dispatch strategy: a RESTAURANT-dispatch order short-circuits to SELF_DISPATCHED (Captain offers no channel and only tracks — the restaurant drives progress and the customer still gets tracking); a CAPTAIN-dispatch order WALKS the city's ranked channel list (CityDeliveryRanking), offering the rank-1 channel. Three triggers advance the walk to the next ranked channel — a partner decline (DeliveryRejectedByPartner), an offer timeout (DeliveryOfferTimedOut) and a manual operator escalate (DeliveryEscalationRequested) — until the list is exhausted, then fails closed with DeliveryDispatchFailed (fail-closed, rules.yaml#/DispatchExhaustionFailsClosed — #60 supersedes the ADR-20260720-004556 numeric cap-3). Channel selection and "channels remain?" are RUNTIME HOOKS (the CityDeliveryRanking read/selection the value forms cannot carry), so each leg carries its branches linearly with notes. Closes the order on delivery by sending MarkOrderDelivered — the Order validates the transition, so a terminal cancelled/rejected order is never resurrected.
⚙️ process manager
ReceivesEmits →Throws
⚡ OrderMarkedReady⚡ DeliveryRequested—
⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartnerThe partner accepted (inbound, recorded by the DeliveryJob aggregate — the courier lives on the job): just advance the run. ⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound
⚡ DeliveryRejectedByPartner⚡ DeliveryDispatchFailed⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound
⚡ DeliveryEscalationRequested⚡ DeliveryDispatchFailed⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound
⚡ DeliveryOfferTimedOut⚡ DeliveryDispatchFailed⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound
⚡ DeliveryStatusUpdated⚡ OrderDelivered⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound
⚡ DeliveryCompleted⚡ OrderDelivered⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant IN as Inbox (trigger)
  participant PM as DeliveryDispatchProcess (decides)
  participant ST as delivery_dispatch_process_manager (state)
  participant RM_OrderTracking as OrderTracking (read model)
  participant RM_Restaurant as Restaurant (read model)
  participant AG_DeliveryJob as DeliveryJob (aggregate)
  participant PT_delivery as port delivery (adapter)
  participant AG_Order as Order (aggregate)
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: OrderMarkedReady (event)
  PM->>RM_OrderTracking: read as order [order_id=OrderMarkedReady.orderId]
  Note over PM: skip unless order.service_type == DELIVERY
  PM->>RM_Restaurant: read as restaurant [restaurant_id=OrderMarkedReady.restaurantId]
  PM->>AG_DeliveryJob: deliver DeliveryRequested — the aggregate records it
  PM->>PT_delivery: offer_job
  PM->>ST: set order_id=OrderMarkedReady.orderId, restaurant_id=OrderMarkedReady.restaurantId, delivery_job_id=DeliveryRequested.deliveryJobId, process_status=?, offer_attempts=?, current_rank=?, current_channel=?
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DeliveryAcceptedByPartner (event)
  PM->>ST: by delivery_job_id=DeliveryAcceptedByPartner.deliveryJobId
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryJobNotFound
  PM->>ST: set process_status=ACCEPTED
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DeliveryRejectedByPartner (event)
  PM->>ST: by delivery_job_id=DeliveryRejectedByPartner.deliveryJobId
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryJobNotFound
  PM->>ST: expect process_status=OFFERED
  PM->>PT_delivery: offer_job
  PM->>ST: set offer_attempts=state.offer_attempts, current_rank=?, current_channel=?, process_status=OFFERED
  Note over PM: skip unless precondition holds
  PM->>AG_DeliveryJob: deliver DeliveryDispatchFailed — the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set process_status=FAILED
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DeliveryEscalationRequested (event)
  PM->>ST: by delivery_job_id=DeliveryEscalationRequested.deliveryJobId
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryJobNotFound
  PM->>ST: expect process_status=OFFERED
  PM->>PT_delivery: offer_job
  PM->>ST: set offer_attempts=state.offer_attempts, current_rank=?, current_channel=?, process_status=OFFERED
  Note over PM: skip unless precondition holds
  PM->>AG_DeliveryJob: deliver DeliveryDispatchFailed — the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set process_status=FAILED
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DeliveryOfferTimedOut (event)
  PM->>ST: by delivery_job_id=DeliveryOfferTimedOut.deliveryJobId
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryJobNotFound
  PM->>ST: expect process_status=OFFERED
  PM->>PT_delivery: offer_job
  PM->>ST: set offer_attempts=state.offer_attempts, current_rank=?, current_channel=?, process_status=OFFERED
  Note over PM: skip unless precondition holds
  PM->>AG_DeliveryJob: deliver DeliveryDispatchFailed — the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set process_status=FAILED
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DeliveryStatusUpdated (event)
  Note over PM: skip unless message.status == DELIVERED
  PM->>ST: by delivery_job_id=DeliveryStatusUpdated.deliveryJobId
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryJobNotFound
  PM->>AG_Order: send MarkOrderDelivered — the aggregate validates
  PM->>ST: set process_status=COMPLETED
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DeliveryCompleted (event)
  PM->>ST: by delivery_job_id=DeliveryCompleted.deliveryJobId
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryJobNotFound
  PM->>AG_Order: send MarkOrderDelivered — the aggregate validates
  PM->>ST: set process_status=COMPLETED
  end

▸View: 🗄️ View_DeliveryJob🔗 #view-view_deliveryjob
source: 🎭 DeliveryJob · 🛶 V0
fed by: ⚡ DeliveryRequested, ⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner, ⚡ DeliveryRejectedByPartner, ⚡ DeliveryStatusUpdated, ⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByRider, ⚡ DeliveryPickedUp, ⚡ DeliveryCompleted, ⚡ DeliveryCancelled, ⚡ DeliveryDispatchFailed
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
delivery_job_id🔤 DeliveryJobId (derived)⚡ DeliveryRequested.deliveryJobIdPK
order_id🔤 OrderId (derived) → 🗄️ OrderTracking⚡ DeliveryRequested.orderIdindex
restaurant_id🔤 RestaurantId (derived) → 🗄️ Restaurant⚡ DeliveryRequested.restaurantId—
status🔤 DeliveryStatus⚡ DeliveryRequested, ⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByRider, ⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner, ⚡ DeliveryPickedUp, ⚡ DeliveryStatusUpdated, ⚡ DeliveryCompleted, ⚡ DeliveryCancelled, ⚡ DeliveryDispatchFailed—Derived from the lifecycle event type / DeliveryStatusUpdated.status (DeliveryDispatchFailed → FAILED, the offer-cap exhaustion).
provider🔤 DeliveryProvider⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByRider, ⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartnernullableINDEPENDENT (rider accepted) or PARTNER (partner accepted); null while PENDING.
rider_id🔤 RiderId⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByRider.riderIdnullableSet for an independent-rider delivery; null for a partner delivery.
courierjsonb⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner.couriernullableCourier { displayName, phone?, riderId? }; from the partner on acceptance (independent rider is in rider_id).
partner_ref🔤 ExternalReference⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner.partnerRefnullablePartner-side delivery id; idempotent key for inbound updates.
pickup_addressjsonb⚡ DeliveryRequested.pickup—
dropoff_addressjsonb⚡ DeliveryRequested.dropoff—
estimated_pickup_attimestamptz⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner.estimatedPickupAtnullable
estimated_dropoff_attimestamptz⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner.estimatedDropoffAtnullable
requested_attimestamptz⚡ DeliveryRequested—DeliveryRequested occurrence time.
picked_up_attimestamptz⚡ DeliveryPickedUpnullable
delivered_attimestamptz⚡ DeliveryCompleted, ⚡ DeliveryStatusUpdatednullableSet on DeliveryCompleted or DeliveryStatusUpdated=DELIVERED (conditional occurrence).
last_partner_rejectiontext⚡ DeliveryRejectedByPartner.reasonnullableReason of the latest partner decline (the job stays PENDING and is re-offered, up to the 3-offer cap — ADR-20260720-004556); null if never rejected.
created_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
updated_attimestamptz⚠️ none—technical — stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)

Restaurant/admin cancels a delivery job before it completes.

throws: ⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound, ⛔ InvalidDeliveryStatus

reasonstring⬜ nullable
▸Command: 📩 EscalateDelivery🔗 #command-escalatedelivery
Restaurant/admin asks to skip the delivery channel currently offered and advance the ranked walk now (#60). The DeliveryJob emits DeliveryEscalationRequested; DeliveryDispatchProcess offers the next ranked channel, or fails the dispatch closed when the walk is exhausted. Self-dispatch and exhaustion are handled by the saga (a benign skip / a terminal fact), not rejected as command errors.
dispatched by: ✏️ escalateDelivery · handled by 🎭 DeliveryJob
emits: ⚡ DeliveryEscalationRequested
throws: ⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryJobId🔤 DeliveryJobId✅ required
reasonstring⬜ nullable

throws: ⛔ DeliveryJobNotFound, ⛔ InvalidDeliveryStatus

deliveryJobId🔤 DeliveryJobId✅ required
riderId🔤 RiderId✅ required

▸Command: 📩 RegisterDeliveryPartnerAvailability🔗 #command-registerdeliverypartneravailability
A delivery partner self-registers its availability to serve a city on a catalog channel (#61). Birth of a DeliveryPartnerRegistration; lands PENDING until an admin approves. registrationId is client-generated (idempotent).
dispatched by: ✏️ registerDeliveryPartnerAvailability · handled by 🎭 DeliveryPartnerRegistration
emits: ⚡ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityRequested
throws: ⛔ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityAlreadyRequested
FieldTypeReq.Description
registrationId🔤 DeliveryPartnerRegistrationId✅ requiredClient-generated id for the new availability registration.
channel🔤 DeliveryChannelKey✅ requiredThe catalog channel this partner operates (e.g. 'uber_direct').
cityId🔤 CityId✅ required
partnerName🔤 DeliveryPartnerName✅ required
contactEmail🔤 EmailAddress✅ required
▸Command: 📩 ApproveDeliveryPartnerAvailability🔗 #command-approvedeliverypartneravailability
An admin approves a PENDING delivery-partner availability registration (#61); it becomes eligible for the city's dispatch ranking.
dispatched by: ✏️ approveDeliveryPartnerAvailability · handled by 🎭 DeliveryPartnerRegistration
emits: ⚡ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityApproved
throws: ⛔ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityNotFound, ⛔ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityNotPending
FieldTypeReq.Description
registrationId🔤 DeliveryPartnerRegistrationId✅ required

⚡ Events (23)
▸Event: ⚡ DeliveryRequested🔗 #event-deliveryrequested
A delivery job has been created for a ready DELIVERY order and offered for fulfilment (dispatched to a partner and/or made available to independent riders). Emitted by DeliveryDispatchProcess.
emitted by: 🎭 DeliveryJob, 🎭 DeliveryDispatchProcess
consumed by: 🎭 DeliveryJob
projected into: 🗄️ View_DeliveryJob
FieldTypeReq.Description
mode🔤 Mode⬜ optional
deliveryJobId🔤 DeliveryJobId✅ required
orderId🔤 OrderId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
pickup📦 Address✅ requiredRestaurant pickup address.
dropoff📦 Address✅ requiredCustomer delivery address.
provider🔤 DeliveryProvider⬜ nullableIntended channel when known at request time; resolved for certain on acceptance.
▸Event: ⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByRider🔗 #event-deliveryacceptedbyrider
An independent Captain rider accepted the delivery job.
emitted by: 🎭 DeliveryJob
consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ View_DeliveryJob, 🗄️ OrderTracking
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryJobId🔤 DeliveryJobId✅ required
riderId🔤 RiderId✅ required

The rider handed the order over to the customer (independent-rider delivery success).

▸Event: ⚡ DeliveryCancelled🔗 #event-deliverycancelled
A delivery job was cancelled before delivery (e.g. by the restaurant or admin).
emitted by: 🎭 DeliveryJob
consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ View_DeliveryJob
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryJobId🔤 DeliveryJobId✅ required
reasonstring⬜ nullable
▸Event: ⚡ DeliveryDispatchFailed🔗 #event-deliverydispatchfailed
Dispatch failed terminally: the delivery partner declined the job at every offer attempt (cap of 3 total offers, ADR-20260720-004556). Emitted by DeliveryDispatchProcess (like DeliveryRequested) so read models surface the failed job to the restaurant for manual handling; no automatic retry follows.
emitted by: 🎭 DeliveryJob, 🎭 DeliveryDispatchProcess
consumed by: 🎭 DeliveryJob
projected into: 🗄️ View_DeliveryJob, 🗄️ OrderTracking
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryJobId🔤 DeliveryJobId✅ required
orderId🔤 OrderId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
attemptsinteger✅ requiredTotal offer attempts made before giving up (the cap; the birth offer counts as 1).
lastReasonstring⬜ nullableReason carried by the final partner decline, when the partner gave one.
▸Event: ⚡ DeliveryEscalationRequested🔗 #event-deliveryescalationrequested
An operator (restaurant/admin) asked to skip the delivery channel currently offered and advance the ranked walk now (#60). Emitted by the DeliveryJob aggregate handling the EscalateDelivery command; consumed by DeliveryDispatchProcess, which offers the next ranked channel (or fails closed when the walk is exhausted). Internal dispatch mechanics — feeds no View_*.
emitted by: 🎭 DeliveryJob
consumed by: 🎭 DeliveryDispatchProcess
projected into: non-projected
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryJobId🔤 DeliveryJobId✅ required
reasonstring⬜ nullableWhy the operator escalated (optional free text).
▸Event: ⚡ DeliveryOfferTimedOut🔗 #event-deliveryoffertimedout
An outstanding delivery offer expired before the channel answered (#60): the DeliveryOfferTimeoutWorker found an OFFERED run older than the resolved TTL and records this fact (authored like DeliveryDispatchFailed). Recorded by the DeliveryJob aggregate and consumed by DeliveryDispatchProcess, which advances the ranked walk to the next channel (or fails closed when exhausted). Internal dispatch mechanics — feeds no View_*.
emitted by: 🎭 DeliveryJob
consumed by: 🎭 DeliveryJob, 🎭 DeliveryDispatchProcess
projected into: non-projected
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryJobId🔤 DeliveryJobId✅ required
channel🔤 DeliveryChannelKey✅ requiredThe channel whose offer timed out.
rankinteger✅ required1-based rank of the timed-out channel in the city's ranked walk.
reasonstring⬜ nullableOptional detail (e.g. the resolved TTL that elapsed).
▸Event: ⚡ DeliveryAcceptedByPartner🔗 #event-deliveryacceptedbypartner
The delivery partner (e.g. Avelo37) accepted the job and assigned one of its couriers (inbound).
emitted by: 🎭 DeliveryJob
consumed by: 🎭 DeliveryJob, 🎭 DeliveryDispatchProcess
projected into: 🗄️ View_DeliveryJob, 🗄️ OrderTracking
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryJobId🔤 DeliveryJobId✅ required
partnerRef🔤 ExternalReference✅ requiredPartner-side delivery id; idempotent key for inbound updates.
courier📦 Courier✅ required
estimatedPickupAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
estimatedDropoffAtstring date-time⬜ nullable
▸Event: ⚡ DeliveryRejectedByPartner🔗 #event-deliveryrejectedbypartner
The delivery partner declined the job (inbound); the dispatcher must re-offer or fall back to manual.
emitted by: 🎭 DeliveryJob
consumed by: 🎭 DeliveryJob, 🎭 DeliveryDispatchProcess
projected into: 🗄️ View_DeliveryJob
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryJobId🔤 DeliveryJobId✅ required
partnerRef🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
reasonstring⬜ nullable

The delivery partner reported a status change for the job (inbound): PICKED_UP, OUT_FOR_DELIVERY, DELIVERED, FAILED…

consumed by: 🎭 DeliveryJob, 🎭 DeliveryDispatchProcess

partnerRef🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
status🔤 DeliveryStatus✅ required
occurredAtstring date-time⬜ optional
notestring⬜ nullable

A delivery job was assigned to a delivery partner (e.g. Avelo37) for fulfilment.

▸Event: ⚡ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityRequested🔗 #event-deliverypartneravailabilityrequested
A delivery partner self-registered its availability to serve a city on a catalog channel (#61). The registration's birth fact; lands PENDING until an admin approves it.
emitted by: 🎭 DeliveryPartnerRegistration
consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ View_DeliveryPartnerAvailability
FieldTypeReq.Description
registrationId🔤 DeliveryPartnerRegistrationId✅ required
channel🔤 DeliveryChannelKey✅ required
cityId🔤 CityId✅ required
partnerName🔤 DeliveryPartnerName✅ required
contactEmail🔤 EmailAddress✅ required
▸Event: ⚡ DeliveryPartnerAvailabilityApproved🔗 #event-deliverypartneravailabilityapproved
An admin approved a delivery partner's city availability (#61); it becomes eligible for the city's dispatch ranking.
emitted by: 🎭 DeliveryPartnerRegistration
consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ View_DeliveryPartnerAvailability
FieldTypeReq.Description
registrationId🔤 DeliveryPartnerRegistrationId✅ required

A delivery partner's city availability was revoked — withdrawn by the partner or disabled by an admin (#61); no longer eligible.
emitted by: 🎭 DeliveryPartnerRegistration
consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ View_DeliveryPartnerAvailability

registrationId🔤 DeliveryPartnerRegistrationId✅ required
reasonstring⬜ nullable
